2Kings21:24 Te ’ba angu ndea ’diyi ofu ’ba dria e’yo otu­pi opi Amoni ma ruaa ’diyi ra, te ’ba angu ndea ’diyi ’ba Yosiani opiru eri ma paria’i." 
2Kings21:25 ’Yeta azini dria Amonini ’yele diyi, yi sini yi buku opi Yudaa ’diyi ma e’yo ecezuri ma alia ku ya?" 
2Kings21:26 Yi sa eri ’bile eri ngulupini amvu Uzaniri ma aliari ma alia; te mvi erini Yosia nya opi eri ma pariani. 
2Kings22:1 Eli Yosiani ovu aro erini e’dozu opi nyazurisi, eri nya opi Yerusalemua eli kali na. Andri erini ma ru Yedida, Adaya Bozikatiari ma zi’i." 
2Kings22:2 Eri ’ye e’yo onyiru Yehova ma miliari, eri aci geri dria i a’bi Daudini acizu aleniari ma alia, ojani i kalaa dri ndia kani dri ejia ku." 
2Kings22:3 Eri eca ’dini eli mudri drini aro Yosiani opi nyazurisi, opi pe Safani Azalia Mesulamu mvi ma mvi, ’ba e’yo sipiri ma ti jo Yehovania ’yozu, kini," 
2Kings22:4 Mi tu uru kuhani ambo Hilikia vu, ’dini eri ma la silingi ’bani jile jo Yehovania, ’ba pari ’bani fizuri agei tepi ’diyini okule ’ba nde ’diyi vuri;" 
2Kings22:5 onyiru yi ma fe eri ’ba azi ngapi jo Yehovania ’diyi ma drilia ’diyi dri; yi ma fe ’ba azi ngapi jo Yehovania ’diyi dri, yi ma ede pari depi jo ruaa ’diyi ani." 
2Kings22:6 Adaru yi ma fe onduou mbau fapi ’diyi pi ma dria ’ba jo onduouru ’diyi pie, ’ba biriki ’bapi ’diyi pie, mbau pi jezu oni gale ’diyi be, deza jo ma ruaa ’diyi edezu ani." 
2Kings22:7 Indi vini yi ozini yi silingi ’bani fele yi dri ’diyi ma e’yosi ku, a’disiku yini ’yele kililiru­risi." 
2Kings22:8 Te kuhani ambo Hilikia nga ’yo Safani ’ba e’yo sipiri ma tia kini, Ma isu buku azitaniri jo Yehovani ma alia. Te Hilikia nga buku nderi fe Safani dri, eri la eri ra." 
2Kings22:9 Te Safani ’ba e’yo sipiri nga mvi opi vu, nga e’yo omvi opi tia kini, Ati’ba mini wu silingi ovupi jo alia ’diyi, yi fe yi ’ba ’ba azi ngapi jo Yehovani ma alia ’diyi ma drilia ’diyi dri." 
2Kings22:10 Safani ’ba e’yo sipiri olu vini opi tia kini, Kuhani Hilikia fe ma dri buku ra. Te Safani la buku nderi opi ma drilia." 
2Kings22:11 Eri eca ’dini, opi ka e’yo buku azitaniri alia ’diyi eri ra, eri osi bongo ini." 
2Kings22:12 Te opi nga di azita fe kuhani Hilikia pi dri, Ahikamu Safani mvi pie, Akibori Mikaya mvi pie, Safani ’ba e’yo sipiri pie, Asaya ati’bo opiniri pie, ’yozu kini," 
2Kings22:13 Emi mu, emi zi Yehova tia ma dri, azini ’ba nde ’diyi dri, azini ’ba dria Yudaa ’diyi dri, e’yo ovupi buku yini isule ’diri ma alia ’diyi ma e’yosi; a’disiku adra Yehovani di ambo ama vu, a’bipi amani ’diyini e’yo dria ovupi buku ’dori ma alia ’diyi erile ku, e’yo ovupi sizaru ama ma e’yosi ’diyi ’yezu ku indirisi." 
2Kings22:14 ’Dini kuhani Hilikia pi mu nabi okuru Hulida vu, Ahikamu pie, Akibori pie, Safani pie, Asaya pie. Eri ovu oku Salumu ’ba bongo suza ma ta mbapi, Tikiva Harihasi mvi ma mviniri (eri adri Yerusalemu ma esele iriri ma alia); te yi ’yo e’yo eri be." 
2Kings22:15 Eri ’yo yi tia kini, Yehova Mungu Israeliniri ’yo ’dini, Emi ’yo agu emi ti pepi ma vuri ma tia," 
2Kings22:16 Yehova ’yo ’dini, Mi ne, ma nga candi eji pari ’do ma dria ’ba alenia ’diyi be, adaru e’yo dria ovupi buku opi Yudaarini laleri ma alia ’diyi." 
2Kings22:17 A’disiku yini ma kulerisi, yini obiese vele Mungu azini ’diyi dri, ’dini adra mani engazu azi dria yini ’yele dri yinisirisi, e’yo ’disi adra mani nga di okporu pari ’doria, e’yo aluni ngani eri inyu ku." 
2Kings22:18 Te emi ma ’yo opi Yudaa emi ti pepi Yeho­vani zizuri ma tia ’dini kini, Yehova Mungu Israeliniri ’yo ’dini: E’yo mini erile ’diyi ma e’yosi," 
2Kings22:19 etu ndra mini e’yo mani ’yole angu ’dori vu ’ba alenia ’diyi be, kini eri nga eca andruru azini trizaruri erizurisi, asi minini ovule ewu ndesi meneme­nerurisi, mini mi ’bale va Yehova drilia, mini mi bongo osile, wuta wule mindresi ma driliarisi; ma eri mi alu ora, Yehova ’yoni." 
2Kings22:20 E’yo ’disi mi ne, ma nga mi oku tualu mi a’bipi be, mi nga mu ’bile minia asi anzu­rusi, mile mini ngani candi mani ngale jile pari ’ dori ma driari ndre ku indio. Te vi omvi e’vo oni vu dika." 
2Kings23:1 Te opi nga di ’ba tipe, yi oku ’ba ’wara Yudaa ’diyi dria eri vu, ’ba ’wara Yerusalemua ’diyi be." 
2Kings23:2 Opi tu uru jo Yehovaniria, ’ba dria Yudaa ’diyi pie, ’ba Yerusalemua ’diyi pie, ’ba kuhaniru ’diyi pie, ’ba nabiru ’diyi pie, ’ba dria, were ’diyi be, ambo ’diyi be; eri la yi bilia e’yo dria ovupi buku azizani yini isule jo Yehovani ma aliari ma alia ’diyi ra." 
2Kings23:3 Te opi so pa pati i’diza vu, eri azi aziza Yehova drilia, acizu Yehova vutia azita erini pi ma ta mbazu, e’yo eti nzeza erini ’diyi pie, e’yo erini azile ’diyi pie asi driasi azini orindi driasi, e’yo azizani ovupi sizaru buku nderi ma alia ’diyi edrezu; te ’ba dria yi so pa yi ecizu aziza nderi ma alia." 
2Kings23:4 Te opi fe azita kuhani ambo Hilikia pi dri kuhani ovupi esele iriri ma alia ’diyi pie, ’ba pari ’bani fizuri ma agei tepi ’diyi pie, afa dria edele Baali pi dri, Asera pie, ongulumu ’bua ’diyi pieri ofuzu hekalu Yehova­niasi amve; eri eve yi Yerusalemu ma tia amve, angu Yi Kidroniari ma ria, omvu of uta yini ji Betelia." 
2Kings23:5 Eri onze kuhani wura tokoni opi Yudaa ’diyini o’bale obiese vezu pari uruleru aku Yudaa ’diyia, azini Yerusalemu ageia ’diyia ’diyi raj onze vini indi ’ba obiese vepi Baali pi dri, etu pie, mba pie, ’bi’bio amboru pie, ongulumu ’bua ’diyi pie ’diyi." 
2Kings23:6 Eri ofu vini Aserani Yeho­va ma joa, Yerusalemuasi amve yi ara Kidronia, eve eri yi ara Kidroni ma tia, odi eri ecazu furaru, ayi eri ’ba saaru ma nyadria," 
2Kings23:7 Eri asu jo agupi ali o’bapi agupi azinisi ’diyini ovupi jo Yehovani ma alia ’diyi va, pari okuni adrizu bongo cazu o’izu Asera dri ’diyi." 
2Kings23:8 Eri ofu kuhani dria aku Yudaa ’diyiasi, eri eza vini pari uruleru kuhanini obiese vezu, engazu Gebaa cazu Beeri-sebaa ’diyi; eri onyo vini pari uruleru kalitilia, ovupi pari ’bani fizu kalitile Yosua ambo aku ndeariniria, ovupi dri ejia kalitile ’bani fizu aku ndea ’diyi, asu yi va." 
2Kings23:9 Te kuhani pari uruleru ’diyia ’diyi tuni pari edeta edezu Yehovani Yerusalemuaria ku, te yi nya mikate akufi kokoruri yi adripi eselia." 
2Kings23:10 Eri eza vini Tofetini ovupi e’bu Hinomu anzipiniri ma aliari, ’dini ’ba aluni econi agupimva kani zamva erini vezaru edetaru Moleki dri ku." 
2Kings23:11 Eri onze akanya opi Yudaa ’diyini opele ovuzu etuni ’diyi, yi ovu pari ’bani fizu jo Yehovaniaria, Natani-meleki ’ba jo driliari ma jo ovupi opi vile jo vu ogogori ma ageia; eri eve vini gari opele etu dri ’diyi acisi." 
2Kings23:12 Te pari edeta edezu ovupi jo uruleru Ahazi­niri ma dria, opi Yudaa’diyini edele ’diyi, azini pari edeta edezu Mana­seni edele iriidri iri jo Yehovania ’diyi ma alia ’diyi, opi asu yi va, onyo yi nyingiriki, omvu ofuta yini, ji oda yi Kidroni alia." 
2Kings23:13 Te pari uruleru Yerusalemu ma kalaa etuni efuria­leruria, ovupi oni ezataniri ma kala uruleruria, Sulemani opi Israelinirini edele Asitoreti adrou onzikanyaru ’ba Sidonia ’diyiniri pi dri, Kemosi adrou onzikanyaru Moabuniri pie, Milikomu adrou onzikanyaru Amoni anziniri pie, opi eza yi ra." 
2Kings23:14 Eri onyo vini afa i’dile inzizaru ’diyi nyingiriki, eri oli Aserani va, fe pari yini ga tre ’ba avu falasi." 
2Kings23:15 Te pari uruleru Beteliari, azini pari uruleru Yeroboamu Nebati mvi fepi ndra Israelini e’yo onzi ’yezurini edeleri, eri asu pari edeta edezu nderi pi va pari uruleru be; eri ve pari uruleru nderi, odi onini furaru, ve Aserani indi." 
2Kings23:16 Te Yosia ka i oja, eri ne nyadri ovupi oni nde ma dri mbiliria ’diyi; eri pe ’ba ti fala nyadri alia ’diyi onzezu, ve yi pari edeta edezuri ma dria, eri eza eri, ekile e’yo Yehovani, ’ba Munguni ndra e’yo ’diyi olupirini olulerile." 
2Kings23:17 ’Di ma vutia eri ’yo, Oni sile nyadriru mani nele ’dari ovu a’dini ya? ’Ba aku ndeni ’diyi ’yo eri tia kini, Eri ovu nyadri ’ba Mungunirini, eri’i engapi Yudaa, ndra e’yo mini te ’yele pari edeta edezu Beteliari vu ’diyi olupiri’i." 
2Kings23:18 Eri ’yo, Emi ku eri; ’ba aluni ma nze fala erini ku. E’yo ’disi yi ku fala erini, fala nabi engapi Samariaarini be." 
2Kings23:19 Pari uruleru aku Samariaa ’diyia, opi Israelini edele ndra adra Yehovani engazu ’diyi, Yosia onze jo pari ndea ’diyi dria, eri ’ye yi vu trotro ekile erini ’yele Beteliarile." 
2Kings23:20 Eri ofu kuhani ovupi pari urulerua ’dale ’diyi dria pari edeta edezu ’diyi ma dria, eri eve fala ’bani yi ma dria. ’Di ma vutia eri mvi Yerusalemua." 
2Kings23:21 Te opi nga azi ’ba dria tia kini, Emi ma mba omu agaza ’badrilesiri ma ta Yehova Mungu eminiri dri, ekile e’yo ovupi sizaru buku azizaniri ma aliarile," 
2Kings23:22 Adaru omu agaza ’ba drilesiri ovuni ta mbazaru ’dinile ku engazu ’ba e’yo lipi Israeli dri ’diyi ma ewusi, kani ewu opi Israelini ’diyi pini opi Yudaa ’diyi be ’diyisi dria;" 
2Kings23:23 te yi mba omu agaza ’ba drilesi ’dori ma ta Yerusalemua eli mudri drini aro Yosiani opi nyazu­risi. 
2Kings23:24 Indi vini Yosia onze ’ba oleou­ru ’diyi pi ’ba ojouru ’diyi be, wura terafiniruri pie, wura toko inzile ’diyi pie, afa onzikanyaru isule angu Yudani ma alia angu Yerusalemuni beria ’diyi dria, ’dini eri ma edre e’yo ovupi sizaru buku kuhani Hilikiani isule jo Yehovaniari ma alia ’diyi." 
2Kings23:25 Eri drilia opi azini erile, i ojapi Yehova vu asi driasi azini orindi driasi azini okpo driasi, ekile azita Musani ’yolerileri aluniyo; eri ma vutia opi aluni erileni efuni ku indi." 
2Kings23:26 Te ti, Yehova oi ani i adra okporu i olipi nzanza dipi Yuda vu, Manaseni e’yo onzi ’yele adra erini engazurisiri kuzu ku." 
2Kings23:27 Te Yehova ’yo kini, Ma nga Yudani nze ma miliasi ekile mani Israelini nzele ’borile, ma nga vini aku Yerusalemu mani pele ’dori pi o’be, jo mani ’yole ndra eri ma e’yosi kini, Ru manini nga ovu ’daa-ri be." 
2Kings23:28 ’Yeta azini dria Yosiani, e’yo erini ’yele ’diyi pie dria, yi sini yi buku opi Yudaa ’diyi ma e’yo ecezuri ma alia ku ya?" 
2Kings23:29 O’du erini ma eselia Farau-neko opi Misiriari mu uru yi ara Ufiratea a’di ’dizu opi Asuriaari be. Opi Yosia mu a’di ’dizu eri be; te Farau-neko ka eri ne ra, eri fu eri Megidoa ra." 
2Kings23:30 Ati’ba erini ji avu erini gari alia, engazu Megidoa cazu Yerusalemua, yi sa eri ’bile eri ngulupini ma alia. Te ’ba angu ndea ’diyi ’du Yehoahazi Yosia mvini, osu odu drinia, ’ba eri opiru ati ma paria." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoahazi ovu eli he kali iri drini na erini e’dozu opi nyazurisi, eri nya opi mba na Yerusalemua. Andri erini ma ru Hamutali, Yeremia Libinaari ma zi’i." 
2Kings23:32 Eri ’ye e’yo ovupi onzi Yehova miliari, tro tro a’bipi erini ’diyini ’yele driarile," 
2Kings23:33 Te Farau-neko nga eri ’i aruru Ribila angu Hamatiaria, eri ma nya ani opi Yerusalemua ku beni, azini eri li angu nderi dria onzi dahabuni fezu turu alu, onzi alu meleni be." 
2Kings23:34 Te Farau-neko ’ba Eliakimu Yosia mvini opiru eri ati Yosia ma paria, eri oja vini ru erini ovuzu Yehoyakimu’i. Te eri ji Yehoahazini ’daa; eri ca Misiria, dra ’daa." 
2Kings23:35 Te Yehoyakimu fe dahabu nde pi Farau dri mele nde be; te eri li silingi ’ba angu ndea ’diyi ma dria, fezu ekile azita Farauni azilerile. Eri ’du dahabu pi mele be ’ba angu ndea ’diyi ma dria alu alu ekile lile alu alu yi driarile, eri fezu Farau-neko dri beni." 
2Kings23:36 Eli Yehoyakimuni ovu kali iri drini towi erini e’dozu opi nyazuri­si, te eri nya opi eli mudri drini alu Yerusalemua, Andri erini ma ru Zebida, Pedaya Rumaari zi’i." 
2Kings23:37 Eri ’ye e’yo ovupi onzi Yehova ma miliari, ekile i a’bipini ’yele driarile." 
2Kings24:1 Ewu erinisi Nebukadineza emu uru, azini Yehoyakimu eca ati’bo eriniriru ovuzu ’dini eli na; ’di ma vutia eri oja i, mbu eri ma ruaasi amve." 
2Kings24:2 Te Yehova pe asikari ongulumuru ’ba Kalidea ’diyini pi ma ti a’di ’dizu eri be, asikari ongulumuru ’ba Suriaa ’diyini pie, asikari ongulumuru ’ba Moabua ’diyini pie, asikari ongulumuru Amoni anzini ’diyi pie, eri pe yi ti Yudaa eri dri Jazu, ekile e’yo Yeho­vani erini ’yole ati’ba erini nabiru ’diyi ma tisirile." 
2Kings24:3 Adaru e’yo nderi eca Yuda ma dria azita Yeho­vani azileri ma e’yosi, yi nzezu eri ma miliasi, e’yo onzi Manasenisi, dria ekile erini ’yelerile," 
2Kings24:4 indi vini erini ari adale e’yo kokoru akarisi; a’disiku eri ga Yerusalemuni tre ari ’ba e’yo koko ’diyinisi, te Yehova leni i e’yo onzi erini wuzu ku." 
2Kings24:5 ’Yeta azini Yehoyakimuni, e’yo erini ’yele ’diyi pie dria, yi sini yi buku opi yudaa ’diyi-me’eyo ecezuri ma alia ku ya?" 
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakimu la i a’bipi be, te mvi erini Yehoyakini nya opi eri ma pariani." 
2Kings24:7 Te opi Misiriari funi dika angu eriniasi ku, a’disiku opi Babuloniari o’du angu opi Misiriarini engazu Yi Misiri­aria cazu kpere yi ara Ufiratea dria." 
2Kings24:8 Eli Yehoyakinini ovu mudri drini aro erini e’dozu opi nyazurisi, eri nya opi mba na Yerusalemua. Andri erini ma ru Nehusita, Elina­tani Yerusalemuaari zi’i." 
2Kings24:9 Te eri ’ye e’yo ovupi onzi Yehova ma miliari, ekile dria atini ’yele­rile." 
2Kings24:10 Ewu nderisi ati’ba Nebukadi­neza opi Babuloniarini ’diyi etu uru Yerusalemua, ace eri ombasi kuru." 
2Kings24:11 Te Nebukadineza nga eca aku nderia, ati’ba erini ’diyini eri acezu ombasiria;" 
2Kings24:12 te Yehoyakini opi Yudaari eri ngulupi pi nga efu opi Babuloniari vu, andri erini pie, ati’ba erini ’diyi pie, opi erini ’diyi pie, ’ba amboru erini ’diyi pie. Te opi Babuloniari ’du eri aruru eli aro eru opi nyazurisi." 
2Kings24:13 Eri wu lonyi dria jo Yehovani ma alia ’diyi pi, lonyi opi ma jo alia ’diyi be, eri oli afazu meleni Sulemani opi Israelini­rini edele hekalu Yehovani ma alia ’diyi dria ekile Yehovani ’yolerile." 
2Kings24:14 Eri ’du Yerusalemuni dria, ’ba opiru ’diyi pie dria, ’ba ombaru ’diyi pie dria, adaru ’ba ati’baru alifu mudri ’diyi pie, onduou ’diyi pie dria, ’ba oka dipi ’diyi pie dria, aluni aceni ku pe kiri ’ba toko tokoa angu nde alia ’diyi." 
2Kings24:15 Eri ’du Yehoya­-kinini ji Babulonia; te opi ma andri pi, oku opini ’diyi pie, ’ba amboru erini ’diyi pie, ’ba opiru angu ndea ’diyi pie, eri o’du yi Yerusalemuasi jizu Babulonia ati’baru." 
2Kings24:16 Te agupi dria okporu ’diyi, yi ’ba alifu aziri, onduouru ’diyi ’ba oka dipi ’diyi be yi alifu alu, yi ’ba dria okporu ecopi a’di ’dipi ’diyi, opi Babulo­niari eji ’ba nde ’diyi Babulonia ovuzu ati’baru." 
2Kings24:17 Te opi Babulo­niari ’ba Yehoyakini ati ma adri Mataniani opiru eri ma paria, eri oja ru erini Zedekia’i." 
2Kings24:18 Eli Zedekiani ovu kali iri drini alu erini e’dozu opi nyazurisi, eri nya opi eli mudri drini alu Yerusalemua. Andri erini ma ru Hamutali, Yere­mia Libinaari zi’i." 
2Kings24:19 Eri ’ye e’yo ovupi onzi Yehova ma miliari, ekile e’yo dria Yehoyakimuni ’yelerile." 
2Kings24:20 Adra Yehovanisi eri eca ’dini Yerusalemu pi ma alia Yuda be, ecazu Yehovani yi ’bezu i miliasiria." 
2Kings25:1 Te Zedekia mbu opi Babuloniari ma ruaarisi amve. Eli oromi ma mba mudri ma o’du mudrisi erini opi nyazu­risi, Nebukadineza opi Babuloniari emu asikari ongulumuru erini be dria a’di ’dizu Yerusalemua, yi ace eri kuru; yi ede pari okporu ombaniri ageinia dria." 
2Kings25:2 ’Dini yi ace aku nde agei cazu eli mudri drini alu Zedekiani opi nyazurisi. 
2Kings25:3 Mba su ma o’du oromisi liki ’de ambo aku nderia, ’dini nyaka ’ba angu ndea ’diyi dri yo." 
2Kings25:4 Te yi anyo geri abi ruaa, te inisi ’ba dria ombani ’diyi yi apa geri kalitile abi iri eselia ovupi amvu opiniri ageiarisi, te ’ba Kalideyaa ’diyi ace aku agei kuru. Te yi mu geri Arabaarisi." 
2Kings25:5 Te asikari ongu­lumuru ’ba Kalideyani ’diyi nga opi ma vuti dro ra, yi nga eri isu angu senderu Yerikoaria; te asikari ongu­lumuru erini ’diyi dria ere yi eri vusi." 
2Kings25:6 Yi bi opini, ji eri uru Ribilaa opi Babuloniari vu; li e’yo eri ma dria." 
2Kings25:7 Yi ofu agupianzi Zedekiani eri milia ayii, yi oso mile Zedekiani ra, ’i eri anzirikusi, ji eri Babulonia." 
2Kings25:8 Mba towi ma o’du azirisi-’di eli mudri drini oromi Nebukadineza opi Babuloniarini opi nyazurisi­ambo asikari opi agei tepi ’diyi ma driliari, Nebuzaradani ati’bo opi Babuloniarini, eca Yerusalemua." 
2Kings25:9 Eri eve jo Yehovani pi jo opini pie, jo dria Yerusalemua ’diyi pie; eri eve jo ambo ambo ’diyi dria acisi." 
2Kings25:10 Asikari ongulumuru ’ba Kalide­yani dria ovupi ambo asikari opi age tepi ’diyi driliari be ’diyi, yi onyo abi kaliru Yerusalemuari kala vusi kala vusi." 
2Kings25:11 Te ’ba joloko acepi aku nde alia ’diyi, azini ’ba apapi yi ojapi opi Babuloniari vu ’diyi pie, ’ba ongulumuru ma joloko ’diyi pie, Nebuzaradani ambo asikari opi agei tepi ’diyi ma driliari ’du yi ji ovuzu ati’baru." 
2Kings25:12 Te ambo asikari opi ’agei tepi ’diyi ma driliari ku ’ba alio­emveru angu ndea ’diyi ma azi pati zabibuni ma agei tezu azini nga ’yazu. 
2Kings25:13 Te afa i’dile pa sopi piriru molaru ovupi jo Yehovani ma alia ’diyi pi afa etini ’bazu ’diyi pie, otaka molaru miriniri pie, ovupi jo Yeho­vani ma alia ’diyi, ’ba Kalideyani ’diyi onyo yi nyingiriki, omvu mola afa ndeni ji Babulonia." 
2Kings25:14 Yi onze vini imvu pi, pau pie, akpaa pie, kabile pie, afazu molaru azi ngazu dria ’diyi pie." 
2Kings25:15 Ambo asikari opi agei tepi ’diyi ma driliari ji vini imvu ajikoru acioluni ’diyi pie, awala ’diyi pie. Eri ’du afa ovupi meleru ’diyi ma meleni, eri ’du vini afa ovupi daha­buru ’diyi ma dahabuni." 
2Kings25:16 Mola ovupi afa iri i’dile pa sopi piriru ’diyi pi ma ruaari, miri alu nderi pie, afa etini ’bazu ’diyi pie, Sulemanini edele jo Yehovani dri ’diyi, econi nziza yini o’bizaru ku." 
2Kings25:17 Afa piriru ’diyi ma alu ma zoza ovu wuale mudri drini aro, dri molaru ovu drinia; dri nde ma zoza uruleru ovu wuale na; emba onyiafaruri pi ovu dri nde ageia kuru pomegranateni be, yi dria molaru. Afa piriru iriri ovu afa onyi­afaru be trotro ’diyile, emba be indi." 
2Kings25:18 Te ambo asikari opi agei tepi ’diyi ma driliari bi kuhani ambo agapiri Seraya pi, Zefania kuhani eri vutiari pie, ’ba na pari ’bani fizuri agei tepi ’diyi pie;" 
2Kings25:19 azini aku amboa eri bi ambo alu ovupi ’ba ombaa ’diyi ma driliari pie, ’ba towi ovupi opi vu ogogo ovupi aku nde alia ’diyi pie; ’ba e’yo sipi ambo adri­pi ’ba okupi angu nderiari vileri pie; azini ’ba kali azia yini isule aku nde alia ’diyi pie." 
2Kings25:20 Te Nebuzaradani ambo asikari opi agei tepi ’diyi ma driliari ’du yi, ji yi Ribilaa opi Babuloniari vu." 
2Kings25:21 Te opi Babu­loniari co yi, ofu yi Ribila angu Hamatiaria. ’Dini yi ’du Yudani ati’baru angu yiniasi. ’Ba acepi ’diyini apasu Misiriari" 
2Kings25:22 Te eri ’ba Gedalia, Ahikamu Safani mvi ma mvini ovuzu ambo ’ba acepi angu Yudania Nebukadi­neza opi Babuloniarini kule ’diyi drilia." 
2Kings25:23 Ambo asikari drilia ’diyi dria ka eri, ’ba yini be, kini opi Babuloniari ’ba Gedaliani ovuzu ambo, yi nga ca ’ba yini be Gedalia vu Mizipaa, ’ba nde ’diyi ’di: Isimaeli Netania mvi pi, Yohanani Karea mvi pie, Seraya Tanihumeti Netofaari ma mvi pie, Yaazania Maakaari ma mvi pie." 
2Kings25:24 Te Ge­dalia so oyo yi vu, ’ba yini vu indi, ’yo yi tia kini, Emi ru ati’ba ’ba Kalideyani ’diyi ku; emi ovu angu alia, emi nga azi opi Babuloniari dri, ka’dini e’yo eminini nga ovu onyiru." 
2Kings25:25 Te eri eca ’dini mba azirisi, Isimaeli, Netania Elisama mvi ma mvini, eri suru opiniri, eri nga eca tualu ’ba mudri ’diyi be, eri adi Gedalia pi dria Mizipaa, ’ba Yahu­dini azini ’ba Kalideyani ovupi eri be i ’diyi pie, yi odra ra." 
2Kings25:26 Te ’ba dria, ’ba toko ’diyi pi, ’ba ambo ’diyi pie, ambo asikari ongulumuru drilia ’diyi pie, yi nga enga, yi nga eca Misiria, a’disiku yini ’ba Kalideyani ’diyi rulerisi." 
2Kings25:27 Eri eca ’dini, eli kali na drini aziri ma mba mudri drini iri ma o’du kali iri drini aziri Yehoyakinini ovuzu ati’boru angu aziniarisi, o’du ndesi Evili-merodaki opi Babula­niari, eli erini e’dozu opi nyazuri si, eri tru Yehoyakini opi Yudaari jo aruniasi;" 
2Kings25:28 te eri ’yo eri tia asi ndrizasi, eri ’ba oguna erini opiniri uru aga oguna opi ovupi eri be Babulonia ’diyini ra." 
2Kings25:29 ’Dini Yehoyakini tru bongo aruniri ruaasi ra. Eri nya nyaka etuzu opi drilia ewu erinisi dria; 
2Kings25:30 te nyaka awaza erini ma e’yo ovu ’dini, awa nyaka eriniri ’dani, fe nyaka esele eriniri eri dri angu owu vusi, ewu erini ovuzu idrirurisi dria." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu pi, Seti pie, Enosi" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani pi, Mahalaleli pie, Yaredi pie;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoka pi, Metusela pie, Lameki pie;" 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa pi, Semi pie, Hamu pie, Yafeti pie." 
1Chronicles1:5 Yafeti anzipi: Gomeri pi, Mago­gi pi, Madai pi, Yavani pi, Tubali pi, Meseki pi, Tirasi pie." 
1Chronicles1:6 Gome­ri anzipi: Asikenazi pi, Difati pi, Togarima pie." 
1Chronicles1:7 Yavani anzipi: Elisa pi, Tarisisi pi, Kitimu pi, ’ba Rodanini ’diyi pie." 
1Chronicles1:8 Hamu anzipi: Kusi pi, Mizirai­mu pi, Puti pi, Kanani pie." 
1Chronicles1:9 Kusi anzipi: Seba pi, Havila pi, Sabita pi, Raama pi, Sabiteka pie. Raama anzipi: Seba pi, Dedani be." 
1Chronicles1:10 Ku­si ti Nimirodini; eri e’do ovuzu ’ba okporu nyaku driani," 
1Chronicles1:11 Miziraimu ti ’ba Ludini piyi, ’ba Anamuni pie, ’ba Lehabini pie, ’ba Nafituhini pie," 
1Chronicles1:12 ’ba Patiru­sini pie, ’ba Kasiluhini pie (’ba Filisitini enga ’ba ’diyi ma alia), ’ba Kafitorini pie dria." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanani ti Zidoni mva erini okori pi, Heti pie," 
1Chronicles1:14 ’ba Yebusini pie, ’ba Amorini pie, ’ba Girigasini pie," 
1Chronicles1:15 ’ba Hivini pie, ’ba Arikini pie, ’ba Sinini pie," 
1Chronicles1:16 ’ba Arivadini pie, ’ba Zemarini pie, ’ba Hamarini pie dria." 
1Chronicles1:17 Semi anzipi yi ’di: Elamu pi, Asuri pi, Aripakisadi pi, Ludi pi, Aramu pi, Uzi pi, Huli pi, Geteri pi, Meseki pie." 
1Chronicles1:18 Aripakisadi ti Sela­ni; Sela ti Eberini. 
1Chronicles1:19 Anzi tile Eberi dri ’diyi ndra iri: aluri ma ru Pelegi’i, ewu erinia nyakuni i awale rarisi; adripi eriniri ma ru Yokitani’i." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani ti Alimodadi pi, Selefi pie, Hazarimaveti pie, Yera pie," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu pie, lizali pie, Dikila pie," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali pie, Abimaeli pie, Seba pie," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri pie, Havila pie, Yobabu pie. ’Ba ’diyi dria Yokitani ma anzi." 
1Chronicles1:24 Semi pi, Aripakisadi pie, Sela pie;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi pi, Pelegi pie, Reu pie;" 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi pi, Nahori pie, Tera pie;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Iburamu ’bani omve­le Iburahimu’iri pie. 
1Chronicles1:28 Iburahimu anzipi: Isaka pi Isimaeli be. 
1Chronicles1:29 ’Diyi yi ma a’bi­anzi: mva Isimaelini tile okori Nebayoti’i; vutinia Kedari pi, Adi­beeli pie, Mibisamu pie," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misi­ma pie, Duma pie, Masa pie, Hadadi pie, Tema pie," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi pie, Nafisi pie, Kedema pie. ’Ba ’diyi Isimaeli ma anzi." 
1Chronicles1:32 Anzi Ketura Iburahimu vile oku azinirini tile ’diyi: Zimirani pi, Yokisani pie, Medani pie, Midiani pie, Isibaki pie, Sua pie. Yokisani anzipi: Seba pi Dedani be." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiani anzipi: Efa pi, Eferi pi, Hanoki pi, Abida pi, Elidaa pie. ’Ba ’diyi dria Ketura ma anzi." 
1Chronicles1:34 Iburahimu ti Isakani. Isaka anzipi: Esau pi Israeli be. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esau anzipi: Elifazi pi, Rueli pi, Yeusi pi, Yalamu pi, Kora pie." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifazi anzipi: Temani pi, Omari pi, Zefi pi, Gatamu pi, Kenazi pi, Timina pi, Amaleki pie." 
1Chronicles1:37 Rueli anzipi: Na­hati pi, Zera pi, Sama pi, Miza pie." 
1Chronicles1:38 Seiri anzipi: Lotani pi, Sobali pi, Zibeoni pi, Ana pi, Disoni pi, Ezeri pi, Disani pie." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotani anzipi: Hori pi Homamu be; isu Lotani ma amvini Timina’i. 
1Chronicles1:40 So­bali anzipi: Aliani pi, Manahati pi, Ebali pi, Sefi pi, Onamu pie. Azini Zibeoni anzipi: Aya pi Ana be." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana anzipi: Disoni piyi. Disoni anzipi; Hamurani pi, Esibani pi, tirani pi, Kerani pie." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezeri anzipi: Bilani pi, Zaavani pi, Yaakani pie. Disani anzipi: Uzi pi Arani be." 
1Chronicles1:43 Te opi angu Edomuni nyapi de nga opi azini nyani angu ’ba Israelini ma drilia ku ’diyi yi ’eli: Bela Beori mvi’i; eri ma aku ambori Dinihaba’i. 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela ka dra ’bo, Yobabu Zera mvi ’ba Boziraari nya angu eri ma pariani." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu ka dra ’bo, Husamu engapi ’ba Temanini ’diyi vile anguari nya angu eri ma pariani." 
1Chronicles1:46 Husamu ka dra ’bo, Hadaeli Bedari mvi, ’ba Midia­nini ofupi nyamuko Moabuariari, nya angu eri ma pariani: aku erini ambori ma ru Abiti’i." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadaeli ka dra ’bo, Samila ’ba Masirekaari nya angu eri ma pariani." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samila ka dra ’bo, Saulo Rehoboti Yi ara ma tiariari nya angu eri ma pariani." 
1Chronicles1:49 Saulo ka dra ’bo, Baali-hanani Akibori mvi nya angu eri ma pariani." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baali-hanani ka dra ’bo, Hadadi nya angu eri ma pariani; aku erini ambori ma ru Pai’i, oku eri vileri ma ru Mahetabeli, Matredi Mezahabu zi ma zi’i." 
1Chronicles1:51 Te Hadaeli dra ra. ’Ba amboru opianziru ovupi Edo­mija ’diyi yi ’eli: opi Timina pi, opi Alia pi, opi Yeteti pi," 
1Chronicles1:52 opi Oholibama pi, opi Ela pi, opi Pinoni pi," 
1Chronicles1:53 opi Kenazi pi, opi Temani pi, opi Mibizari pi," 
1Chronicles1:54 opi Magidieli pi, opi Iramu pie. ’Diyi ’ba amboru opianziru Edomua ’diyi." 
1Chronicles2:1 Israeli anzipi yi ’di: Rubeni pi, Simeoni pi, Levi pi, Yuda pi, Isakari pi, Zebuluni pi," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani pi, Yusufu pi, Benyamini pi, Nafutali pi, Gadi pi, Aseri pie." 
1Chronicles2:3 Yuda anzipi: Eri pi, Onani pi, Sela pie; anzi na ’diyi Batisua oku Kanani zini otile eri dri ’diyi. Te Eri, Yuda mvi okori, eri ndra ’ba onzini Yehova ma milia, eri fu eri ani." 
1Chronicles2:4 Te zia Tamari ti eri dri Perezi pi Zera be. Anzi Yudani yi ovu ndra ani dria towi. 
1Chronicles2:5 Perezi anzipi: Hezironi pi Ha­muli be. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zera anzipi: Zimiri pi Etani pi, Hemani pi, Kalikoli pi. Dara pie; yi dria towi." 
1Chronicles2:7 Karimi anzipi: Akari piyi, agu candi fepi ’ba Israelini dri e’yo onzi ’yepi afa trileri ma e’yosiri;" 
1Chronicles2:8 Etani anzipi: Azaria piyi. 
1Chronicles2:9 Azini anzi indi Hezironini otile ’diyi: Yerameeli pi, Ramu pi, Kelu­bai pie." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu ti Aminadabuni, Aminadabu ti Nasonini, opiru anzi Yudani ma driliari." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasoni ti Salimani, Salima ti Boazini," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boazi ti Obedini, Obedi ti Yeseni." 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese ti mva okori Eliabu’i, Aminadabu mva erini iriri, nari Simca’i," 
1Chronicles2:14 mva suri Neta­neli’i, towiri Radai’i," 
1Chronicles2:15 aziari Oze­mu’i, aziriri Daudi’i;" 
1Chronicles2:16 amvipi yi Zeruiya pi Abigaili be. Zeruiya anzipi yi ’di: Abisai pi, Yoabu pi, Asaheli pie, yi na." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili ti Amasani, Amasa ma atini Yeteri Isimaeli anziyiruri’i." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu Hezironi mvi oti anzi oku erini Azuba pi dri Yerioti be; anzi erini agupianziru ’diyi yi ’di: Yeseri pi, Sobabu pi, Aridoni pie." 
1Chronicles2:19 Te Azuba ka dra ’bo, Kalebu ’du Efirati ini okuru, ti eri dri Huri’i." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri ti Urini, Uri ti Bezalelini." 
1Chronicles2:21 Vutinia Hezironi mu fi Makiri Gileadi ma ati ma zi vu, erini ’dule i ma okuru de isu eli erini kali aziari; oku nde ti erini Segubi’i;" 
1Chronicles2:22 Se­gubi ti Yairi ovupi aku amboru be kali iri drini na angu Gileadiniari. 
1Chronicles2:23 Te Gesuri pi Aramu be opa aku Yairini Kenati pie ra, opa aku were yini ’diyi indi, kalafe aku ambo ambo ’diyini dria kali azia. ’Ba ’diyi driayi anzi Makiri Gileadi ma atini," 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezironi ka dra Kalebu-efirataa ’bo, vilerisi Abiya Hezironi ma okururi ti erini Asuri Tekoa ma atini andrua." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yerameeli Hezironi ma mva okori ma anzipi, yi Ramu mva okori pi, Buna pi, Oreni pi, Ozemu pi, Ahiya pie." 
1Chronicles2:26 Te Yerameeli ovu oku azini be, runi Atara’i; eri Onamu ma andri’i." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ramu Ye­rameeli ma mva okori ma anzipi, yi Maazi pi, Yamini pi, Ekeri pie." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onamu anzipi yi Samai pi Yada Ibe. Samai anzipi: Nadabu pi Abisuri be. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisuri vile okuri ma ru Abihaili’i, oku nde ti erini Abani pi Molidi be." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadabu anzipi: Se­ledi pi Apaimu be; te Seledi dra anzikokoru. 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaimu anzipi: Isi piyi. Te Isi anzipi Sesani piyi. Sesani anzipi: Alai piyi. 
1Chronicles2:32 Yada, Samai ma adripi ma anzipi: Yeteri pi Yonatani be; te Yeteri dra anzi ko­koru." 
1Chronicles2:33 Yonatani anzipi Peleti pi Zaza be. ’Ba ’diyi yi anzi Yeramee­lini. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesanini agupianzi yo, kiri ezoanzini a’dule; te Sesani ovu ati’bo be indi Misiriouni, runi Yara’i," 
1Chronicles2:35 Sesani fe i ma zini Yara ati’bo ini dri okuru, eri ti erini Ataini." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai ti Natanini, azini Natani ti Zabadini." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi ti Efilalini, Efilali ti Obedini." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi ti Yehuni, Yehu ti Azariani." 
1Chronicles2:39 Aza­ria ti Helezini, Helezi ti Eleasani." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa ti Sisimaini, Sisimai ti Salumuni." 
1Chronicles2:41 Salumu ti Yekamia­ni, Yekamia ti Elisama’i." 
1Chronicles2:42 Kalebu Yerameeli ma adri ma anzipi: Mesa mva erini okori piyi, ndra Zifi ma atiruri’i; anzi Maresa Hebironi ma atini pie." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebironi anzipi: Kora pi, Tapua pi, Rekemu pi, Sema pie." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema ti Rahamu Yorikeamu ma atini; Rekemu ti Samaini. 
1Chronicles2:45 Te Samai ma mvini Maoni’i; Maonini Betizuri ma ati’i. 
1Chronicles2:46 Te Efa Kalebu vile oku aziniri ti Harani pi, Moza pi, Gazezi pie; Harani ti Gazezini." 
1Chronicles2:47 Yadai anzi­pi: Regemu pi, Yotamu pi, Gesani pi, Peleti pi, Efa pi, Saafu pie." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka Kalebu vile oku aziniri ti Seberi pi, Tirihana be." 
1Chronicles2:49 Eri ti vini Saafu Madimana ma atinini, Seva Makibena ma ati pi, Gibea ma ati pie; te Kalebu zini Akisa’i." 
1Chronicles2:50 ’Ba ’diyi ndra Kalebu ma anzi. Huri Efirata ma mva okori ma anzi: Sobali Kiriati-yearimu ati’i," 
1Chronicles2:51 Salima Betilehemu ma ati pie, Harefu Beti-gaderi ma ati pie." 
1Chronicles2:52 Sobali Kiriati-yearimu ma ati ma agianzi azini ’diyi indi: Haroe piyi, yi Menuhoti ma egalepi." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ori’ba Kiriati-yearimuni yi ’di: ’ba Itirini piyi, ’ba Putini pie, ’ba Sumatini pie, ’ba Misiraini pie; ’ba Zoratini piyi efu ’ba Esitaolini be yi ma alia." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salima anzipi: Betilehemu pi, ’ba Netofatini pie, Atroti-beti-yoabu pie, ’ba Manahatini ma egalepi pie, ’ba Zorani pie." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ori’ba ’ba waraga sipi ovupi Yabezia ’diyini: ’ba Tiratini piyi, ’ba Simeatini pie, ’ba Sukatini pie. Yi ovu ndra ’ba Kenini, Hamati Rekabu anziyi ma ati ma ori’ba." 
1Chronicles3:1 2Anzi Daudini ndra otile Hebiro­nia ’diyi yi ’di: mva okori Ami­noni, Ahinoamu Yezireeli zini tileri’i; iriri Danieli, Abigaili Karimeli zini tileri;" 
1Chronicles3:1 2Anzi Daudini ndra otile Hebiro­nia ’diyi yi ’di: mva okori Ami­noni, Ahinoamu Yezireeli zini tileri’i; iriri Danieli, Abigaili Karimeli zini tileri;" 
1Chronicles3:2 nari Abisalomu, Maaka Talimai opi Gesuriari ma zi ma mvi’i; suri Adoniya Hagiti mvi’i;" 
1Chronicles3:3 towiri Sefatia, Abitalini tileri; aziari Itireamu, oku erini Egilani tileri." 
1Chronicles3:4 Oti anzi eri dri azia Hebironia; ’daa eri ovu opiru eli aziri drinia mba azia, te Yerusalemua ovu opiru eli kali na drini na indi." 
1Chronicles3:5 Anzi otile eri dri Yerusalemua ’diyi yi ’di: Simea pi, Sobabu pi, Natani pi, Sulemani pie, yi su, Batisua Amieli zini otile ’diyi;" 
1Chronicles3:6 Ibihari pi, Elisama pi, Elifeleti pi," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga pi, Nefegi pi, Yafia pi," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama pi, Eliada pi, Elifeleti pie, yi oromi." 
1Chronicles3:9 Yi dria anzi Daudini ’diyi, drinia oku erini azini ’diyi ma anzi yi indi; Tamarini yi ma amvi." 
1Chronicles3:10 Sulemani mvini Rehoboamu’i, eri ma mvini Abiya’i, eri ma mvini Asa’i, eri ma mvini Yehosafati’i," 
1Chronicles3:11 eri ma mvini Yoramu’i, eri ma mvini Ahazia’i, eri ma mvini Yoasi’i," 
1Chronicles3:12 eri ma mvini Amazia’i, eri ma mvini Azaria’i, eri ma mvini Yota­mu’i," 
1Chronicles3:13 eri ma mvini Ahazi’i, eri ma mvini Hezekia’i, eri ma mvini Manase’i," 
1Chronicles3:14 eri ma mvini Amo­ni’i, eri ma mvini Yosia’i." 
1Chronicles3:15 Yosia anzipi yi ’di; mva okori Yohanani’i, iriri Yehoyakimu’i, nari Zedekia’i, Suri Salumu’i." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yehoyakimu anzipi yi ’di: eri ma mvi Yekonia pi, eri ma mvi Zedekia be;" 
1Chronicles3:17 Yekonia ndra jile ati’boruri ma anzipi Sealitieli eri ma mvi pi," 
1Chronicles3:18 Maliki­ramu pi, Pedaya pi, Senazari pi, Yekamia pi, Hosama pi, Nedabia pie;" 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaya anzipi: Zerubabeli pi Simei be; Zerubabeli anzipi: Mesulamu pi Hanania be, yi amvini Selomiti’i;" 
1Chronicles3:20 Hasuba pi, Oheli pi, Berekia pi, Hasadia pi, Yusabi­hesedi pie, yi towi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanania anzipi: Pelatia pi Yesaya be; Refaya anzipi yi, Arinani anzipi be, Obadia anzipi be, Sekania anzipi pie." 
1Chronicles3:22 Sekania anzipi Semaya piyi. Semaya anzipi: Hatusi pi, Igali pi, Haria pi, Nearia pi, Safati pie, yi azia." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearia anzipi: Elioenai pi, Hizi­kia pi, Azirikamu pie, yi na." 
1Chronicles3:24 Eli­oenai anzipi: Hodavia pi, Eliasibu pi, Pelaya pi, Akubu pi, Yohanani pi, Delaya pi, Anani pie, yi aziri." 
1Chronicles4:1 Yuda anzipi: Perezi pi, Hezironi ’ pi, Karimi pi, Huri pi, Sobali pie." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya Sobali mvi ti Yahatini;, Yahati ti Ahumai pi Lahadi be. ’Diyi ’ ’ba Zoratini ma ori’ba." 
1Chronicles4:3 Te ’ba ’diyi Etamu ati ma anziyi: Yezireeli pi, Isima pi, Idibasi pie; yi amvi ma ru Hazeleliponi’i;" 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueli Gedori ma ati pi, Ezeri Husa ma ati be. ’Ba ’diyi Huri Betilehemu ma ati, Efirata ma mva okori ma anzi." 
1Chronicles4:5 Asuri Tekoa ma atini ndra oku be iri, Hela pi Naara be;" 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara ti i erini Ahuzamu pi, Heferi pi, Temeni pi, Haahasitari pie. ’Diyi anzi Naara­ni." 
1Chronicles4:7 Anzi Helani yi Zereti pi, Izihari pi, Etinani pie." 
1Chronicles4:8 Hakozi ti Anubu pi, Zobeba be, ori’ba Ahariheli Harumu mvini pie dria." 
1Chronicles4:9 Inzi ndra Yabezini aga adripiyi ra; andri ’da ndra ani runi Yabezi’i, kini, Mani eri osile candi berisi." 
1Chronicles4:10 Te Yabezi wu Mungu Israelini vu kini, Mi ma fe drileba ma dri adaru, mi ere kalati mani, azini mi dri ma ovu ma be ani, ’dini mi ma mba ma ta azi onzisi, eri ma ovu candi maniru ku fo! Ka’dini Mungu fe eri dri e’yo erini zileri ra." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu Suha ma adri ti Mehiri ovupi ndra Esitoni ma atirurini. 
1Chronicles4:12 Esitoni ti Beti-rafa pi, Pasea pie, Tehina Irinahasi ma ati pie. ’Ba ’diyi ovu ’ba Rekani." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenazi anzipi: Otinieli pi Seraya be; Otinieli anzipi: Hatati piyi. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai ti Ofira­ni; Seraya ti Yoabu Geharasimu ma atini, yini ovule onduou afa edepi ’diyirisi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kalebu Yefune mvi ma anzipi: Iru pi, Ela pi, Naamu pie; Ela anzipi pie, Kenazi pie." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ye­haleleli anzipi: Zifi pi, Zifa pi, Tiria pi, Asareli pie." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezira anzipi: Yeteri pi, Meredi pi, Eferi pi, Yaloni pie; oku erini ti vini Miriamu pi, Samai pi, Isiba Esitemoa ma ati pie." 
1Chronicles4:18 Oku erini Yahudi zaruri ti Yeredi Gedori ma ati pi, Heberi Soko ma ati pie, Yekutieli Zanoa ma ati pie. Anzi ’diyi ovu anzi Bitia Farau zi, Mere­dini ’dulerini." 
1Chronicles4:19 Nahamu ma amvi, Hodiani ’dule okururi ma anzi yi Keila ’ba Garimuni ma ati pi, Esitemoa ’ba Maakatini be." 
1Chronicles4:20 Si­moni anzipi: Aminoni pi, Rina pi, Beni-hanani pi, Tiloni pie, si anzipi: Zoheti pi Beni-zoheti be." 
1Chronicles4:21 Sela Yuda mvi ma anzipi: Eri Leka ati pi, Laada Maresa ma ati pi, ’ba bongo mile be nyiriari edepi ’diyi ma ori’ba, ovupi Asebea ma ori’baru ’diyi pie;" 
1Chronicles4:22 Yokimu pi, ’ba Kozebaa ’diyi pie, Yoasi pi, Sarafi ndra angu nyapi Moabuari pi, Yasubi-lehemu pie. Te e’yo ’diyi e’yo drioni." 
1Chronicles4:23 Yi ’ba imvu sipi ’diyi, ’ba Netaimu pia Gedera be ’diyi pie; yi ovu ’daa opi pie azi eriniri ’yezu." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeoni anzipi: Nemueli pi, Yamini pi, Yaribu pi, Zera pi, Saulo pie;" 
1Chronicles4:25 eri ma mvini Salumu’i, eri ma mvini Mibisamu’i, eri ma mvini Misima’i." 
1Chronicles4:26 Te Misima anzipi: eri ma mvini Hamueli’i, eri ma mvini Zakuri’i, eri ma mvini Simei’i." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simei ovu di agianzi be mudri drini azia, ezoanzi be azia; te adripi erini ovuni ndra anzi be kakau ku, kani ori’ba yini dria ezuni vini alu anzi Yudanile ku indi." 
1Chronicles4:28 Yi ovu angu Beeri-seeba pia, Molada pie, Hazari-suali pie," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha pia, Ezemu pie, Toladi pie," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betueli pia, Horima pie, Zikilagi pie," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beti-marikaboti pia, Hazari-su­simu, Beti-biri pie, Saaraimu pie dria. Aku ambo ambo yini ndra ’diyi cazu kpere ewu Daudini opi nyazu­risi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Aku were yini Etamu pi, Aini pie, Rimoni pie, Tokeni pie, Asani pie, yi aku ambo ambo dria towi," 
1Chronicles4:33 aku yini dria ndra ovupi aku ambo ambo ’diyi ma kalaasi kuru ’diyi be cazu Baalia. ’Diyi pari ndra yini ovuzu ’diyi, si a’bianzi yini ’diyi ma ru ci indi." 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobabu pi, Yamileki pie, Yosa Amazia mvi pie," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoeli pie, Seraya Asieli mvi ma mva Yosibia ma mvi Yehu pie," 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai pie, Yaakoba pie, Yesohaya pie, Asaya pie, Adieli pie, Yesimieli pie, Benaya pie," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziza Sifi mvi, Aloni mvi, Yedaya mvi, Simiri mvi, Semaya mvi pie-" 
1Chronicles4:38 ’ba ’bani e’dale rusi rusi ’diyi yi opianzini ori’ba yinia, te enyati yi ma atipini ezu tre." 
1Chronicles4:39 Te yi mu angu ’bani fizu Gedori ma aliaria, kpere e’bu nde ma kala etuni efurialeruria, iribi ndazu anyapa yini dri." 
1Chronicles4:40 Yi nga di iribi rupi tu azini onyiruri isu, azini angu nde ovu de walaru, ndi e’yo ’yaasi; ’ba ndra ovupi ’dale oko ’diyini ovule ’ba Hamunirisi." 
1Chronicles4:41 ’Ba ’bani yi ma ru osile ’diyi emu ewu Hezekia opi Yudaarinisi, oco yi ma hema ra, ofu ’ba Meunini yini isule ’dale ’diyi, ja yimadri teketeke,kpere ecazu andru, yi di ovu yi ma paria ’daleni, a’disiku iribini ovule anyapa yini dri ’dale cirisi," 
1Chronicles4:42 ’Ba azini yi ma eselia Simeoni anzipi, yi ’ba turu towi, yi mu oni Seiria, te ’ba yi ma dri cepi ’diyi yi Pelatia pi, Nearia pie, Refaya pie, Uzieli pie, yi si ma anzi;" 
1Chronicles4:43 yi ofu ’ba joloko Amalekini andra apapi ’diyi ra, yi ovu ’dale ecazu kpere andru." 
1Chronicles5:1 Rubeni Israeli ma mvi okori ma anzipi (erini ndra osile okorisi; te erini gbolo i atini ezalerisi, ’ba fe drileba erini mva okoriniri Yusufu Israeli mvi ma anzipi dri, te a’bianzi olaza yini ovuni lazaru drileba mva okorinirile ku;" 
1Chronicles5:2 te Yuda aga i adripi ra azini opi efu eri ma alia ra, te drileba mva okoriniri ovu Yusu­funi)," 
1Chronicles5:3 Rubeni Israeli mvi okori ma anzipi: Hanoki pi, Palu pi, Hezi­roni pi, Karimi pie." 
1Chronicles5:4 Yoeli anzipi: vini Semaya’i, eri ma mvini Gogi’i, eri ma mvini Simei’i," 
1Chronicles5:5 eri ma mvini Mika’i, eri ma mvini Reaya’i, eri ma mvini Baali’i," 
1Chronicles5:6 eri ma mvini Beera’i Tiligati-pilineseri opi Asuriaarini ndra jile ati’boruri’i; eri ndra opiru ’ba Rubenini ma eselia. 
1Chronicles5:7 Te adripi erini ori’ba yini vusi, ’bani a’bianzi yini olaria: ’ba amboru Yeyeli pi, Zakaria pie," 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela Sema Yoeli mvi ma mvi Azazi ma mva ovupi Aroeria kpere Nebo pia, Baali-meoni beri pie;" 
1Chronicles5:9 te kala etuni efurialeru eri ca kpere pari fizu roko dria engazu yi ara Ufirate vuleruria, a’disiku anyapa yinini ezule Gileadia turisi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Te ewu Saulonisi yi ’ba omba ’ba Hagarini be, yini fule yi ma drisi ’diyi; yi adri hema yinia angu dria Gileadi ma kala ’aa’dasi etuni efu­rialeru." 
1Chronicles5:11 Anzi Gadini ri yi ma drilialeru angu Basaninia kpere Salekaa: 
1Chronicles5:12 opiru Yoeli’i, vutiniari Safamu’i, Yanai pi Safati ovupi Basaniari pie." 
1Chronicles5:13 Adripi yini ori’ba yi ma a’bipini ’diyi: Mikaeli pi, Mesulamu pie, Seba pie, Yorai pie, Yakani pie, Zia pie, Eberi pie, yi aziri." 
1Chronicles5:14 Anzi ’diyi ovu anzi Abihaili Huri mvini, mvi Yaroani, mvi Gileadini, mvi Mikaelini, mvi Yesisaini, mvi Yado­ni, mvi Buzini;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi Abidieli Guni mvi ma mva ovu opiru ori’ba yi ma a’bipini drilia; 
1Chronicles5:16 te yi ovu Gileadia, Basani ma alia, azini aku erinia, azini angu Saroni ma ageiaria dria, kpere kalatini asizuria," 
1Chronicles5:17 La ’ba ’diyi dria a’bianzi yini vusi ewu Yotamu opi Yudaniri pini Yeroboamu opi Israeliniri berisi. 
1Chronicles5:18 Anzi Rubeni pini, Gadi pie, suru ali Manaseni pie, ’ba asi teza be, ’ba ecopi gombere omani ’dupi sei be ra, ’ba osu gbipi ra, ’ba ombaru ’diyi dria yi alifu kali su drini su, turu aziri drini kali azia, yi ’ba ndra ecopi mupi a’dia ’diyi." 
1Chronicles5:19 Yi ’di a’di ’ba Hagarini piyi be, Yeturi pie, Nafisi pie, Nodabu pie;" 
1Chronicles5:20 te isu aza koza ra, fe ’ba Hagarini yi ma dria, ’ba ovupi yi be ’diyi pie dria; a’disiku yini wule Mungu vu omba ma aliarisi, eri eri matu yini ra, a’disiku yini a’ita yini ’bale eri ma aliarisi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Yi opa anyapa yini ra: ngamia alifu kali towi, kabilo alifu turu iri drini kali towi, akanya gaaru ’diyi alifu iri, azini agupi yi alifu turu alu." 
1Chronicles5:22 ’Ba odrapi a’dia ’diyi kakau tu a’disiku a’di ndeni ndra ovule Mungunirisi. Te yi ovu yi ma paria kpere ewu ndra juruni yi jizu ati’baruria. 
1Chronicles5:23 Suru ali Manaseni ma anzipi ’ovu angu ndea; yi ezu engazu; Basania cazu Baali-herimoni pia, Seniri pie, oni Herimoni pie." 
1Chronicles5:24 Te ’ba ori’ba yi ma a’bipini ma dri cepi ’diyi yi ’di: Eferi pi, isi pi, Elieli pi, Azirieli pi, Yeremia pi, Hodavia pi, Yadieli pie, yi ’ba ombare, ’ba ru kuzaru, ’ba ori’ba yi ma a’bipini ma dri cepi ’diyi." 
1Chronicles5:25 Te yi ’ye onzi Mungu yi ma a’bipiniri vu, yi aci saaru adrou ’ba ’daa ’diyini ’diyi inzizu, ’ba nde Munguni dri jale yi ma milia ’diyi." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ka’dini Mungu ’ba Israeliniri enga Puli opi Asuriaari pi ma asi Tiligati-pilineseri opi Asuriaari be, eri wu yi ji ati’baru, yi ’ba Rubenini piyi ’ba Gadini pie, suru ali Manaseni pie, eji yi Hala pia, Habori pie, Hara pie, azini yi ara Gozanini ma tia, ecazu kpere andru." 
1Chronicles6:1 Levi anzipi: Gerisoni pi, Kohati pi, Merari pie." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohati anzi­pi: Amiramu pi, Izihari pi, Hebironi pi, Uzieli pie." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amiramu anzipi: Aroni pi, Musa pi, Miriamu pie. Aroni anzipi: Nadabu pi, Abihu pi, Eleazari pi, Itamari pie." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazari ti Finehasini, Finehasi ti Abisuani," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abisua ti Bukini, Buki ti Uzini," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi ti Zerahiani, Zerahia ti Merayotini," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoti ti Amaria­ni, Amaria ti Ahitubuni," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitu­bu ti Zadokini, Zadoki ti Ahimaazini," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi ti Azariani, Azaria ti Yohananini," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanani ti Aza­riani (eri ’ba atalau edeta edepiri ma azi ngapi jo Sulemanini sile Yerusa­lemuariari’i). 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria ti Ama­riani, Amaria ti Ahitubuni," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahi­tubu ti Zadokini, Zadoki ti Salumu­ni," 
1Chronicles6:13 Salumu ti Hilikiani, Hilikia ti Azariani," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria ti Serayani, Seraya ti Yehozadakini;" 
1Chronicles6:15 ji Ye­hozadakini ati’boru ewu Yehovani ’ba Yudaa ’diyi jizu ati’baru ’ba Yerusalemua ’diyi be, Nebukadineza ma driarisi," 
1Chronicles6:16 Levi anzipi: Gerisoni pi, Ko­hati pi, Merari pie." 
1Chronicles6:17 Gerisoni anzipi ma ru yi ’di: Libini pi Simei be. 
1Chronicles6:18 Kohati anzipi yi ndra Ami­ramu pi, Izihari pi, Hebironi pi, Uzieli pie." 
1Chronicles6:19 Merari anzipi: Mali pi Musi be. Te ’ba ’diyi ovu ori’ba ’ba Levini yi ma a’bipi vusi. 
1Chronicles6:20 Gerisoni vile ’diyi: mvini Libi­ni’i, mvini Yahati’i, mvini Zima’i," 
1Chronicles6:21 mvini Yoa’i, mvini do’i, mvini Zera’i, mvini Yeaterai’i," 
1Chronicles6:22 Kohati anzipi: mvini Aminadabu’i, mvini Kora’i, mviru Asiri’i," 
1Chronicles6:23 mini Elikana’i, mvini Ebiasafu’i, mvini Asiri’i," 
1Chronicles6:24 mvini Tahati’i, mvini Urieli’i, mvini Uzia’i, mvini Saulo’i." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elikana anzipi: Amasai pi Ahi­moti be. 
1Chronicles6:26 Te Elikana ma e’yosi, anzi Elikanani ’diyi mvini Zofai’i, mvini Nahati’i," 
1Chronicles6:27 mvini Eliabu’i, mvini Yerohamu’i, mvini Elikana’i." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samueli anzipi mva okori Yoe­li’i, iriri Abiya’i." 
1Chronicles6:29 Merari anzipi: Mali, mvini Libini’i, mvini Simei’i, mvini Uza’i," 
1Chronicles6:30 mvini Simea’i, mvini Hagia’i, mvini Asaya’i." 
1Chronicles6:31 Te ’ba Daudini ’bale azi ongo­niri ma dri cezu; Yehovania, sanduku Munguni ka nga pari ava lizuri isu ’boria ’diyi yi ’di." 
1Chronicles6:32 Yi nga azi ongoniri bere hema ti ecizani­ri ma drilia, ecazu kpere Sulemanini jo Yehovani sizu Yerusalemua ’boria; yi te azi yini ma alia ’dani, yini yi awaleri vusi." 
1Chronicles6:33 ’Ba tepi azi yini ma alia ’dani ’diyi yi ’di, anzi yini be. Kohati anzipi ma eselia: Hemani ’ba ongo ngopiri Yoeli mvi, Samueli mvi," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elikana mvi, Yerohamu mvi, Elieli mvi, Toa mvi," 
1Chronicles6:35 Zufu mvi, Elikana mvi, Mahati mvi, Amasai mvi," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elikana mvi, Yoeli mvi, Azaria mi, Zefania mvi," 
1Chronicles6:37 Tahati mvi, Asiri mvi, Ebiasafu mvi, Kora mvi," 
1Chronicles6:38 Izihari mvi, Kohati mvi, Levi mvi, Israeli mvi." 
1Chronicles6:39 Azini adri Asafu, pa sopi eri ma dri ndiriari, eri Asafu Berekia mvi, Simea mvi," 
1Chronicles6:40 Mikaeli mvi, Baa­seya mvi, Malikiya mvi," 
1Chronicles6:41 Etini mvi, Zera mvi, Adaya mvi," 
1Chronicles6:42 Eta­’ni mvi, Zima mvi, Simei mvi," 
1Chronicles6:43 Yahati mvi, Gerisoni mi, Levi mvi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Yi ma dri elialeruria yi adripi Merari ma anzipiyi: Etani Kisi mvi, Abidi mvi, Maluki mvi," 
1Chronicles6:45 Hasa­bia mvi, Amazia mvi, Hilikia mvi," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amizi mvi, Bani mvi, Semeri mvi," 
1Chronicles6:47 Mali mvi, Musi mvi, Merari mvi, Levi mvi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ope adripi yini ’ba Levini ’diyi azi dria hema jo Munguniarini ngazu. 
1Chronicles6:49 Te Aroni pi anzipi be yi ede edeta pari edeta vezaru edezuri ma dria, azini pari obiese vele veri ede­zuri ma dria, azi dria pari alatararu turini ma e’yosi, azini azi onzi ’ba Israelini ma e’yo edezu ekile azita dria Musa ati’bo Mungunini ndra azilerile." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aroni anzipi yi ’di: mvini Eleazari’i, mvini Finehasi’i, mvini Abisua’i." 
1Chronicles6:51 mvini Buki’i, mvini Uzi’i, mvini Zerahia’i," 
1Chronicles6:52 mvini Merayoti’i, mvini Amaria’i, mvini Ahitubu’i," 
1Chronicles6:53 mvini Zado­ki’i, mvini Ahimaazi’i." 
1Chronicles6:54 Te pari yini ovuzu, yini hema asolerile, angu yini ma esele vusi ’diyi yi ’di: Aroni anzipi ori’ba Kohatini ’diyi dri, odrisini fele yi ma runi e’dale okorisi, yi fe ’dini:" 
1Chronicles6:55 yi fe yi dri Hebironini Yuda ma angua, angu ageinia ’diyi be dria;" 
1Chronicles6:56 te amvu aku amboru ndeni, aku nyiri erini ’diyi be, fe yi Kalebu Yefune mvi dri." 
1Chronicles6:57 Aroni anzipi dri yi fe aku ambo ambo ’bani apazu yi ma alia ’diyi: Hebironi pi, Libina pi angu ageiniari be indi, Yatiri pi, Esitemoa pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hileni pi angu ageiniari be, Debiri pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:59 Asani pi angu agemiani be, Beti-semesi pi angu ageiniari be;" 
1Chronicles6:60 azini suru Benyaminini ma eselia yi ’di: Geba pi angu ageiniari be, Alemeti pi angu ageiniari be, Anatoti pie angu ageiniari be. Aku ambo ambo dria ori’ba yini vusi ’diyi mudri drini na." 
1Chronicles6:61 Kohati anzipi acepi ’diyi drii yi fe odrisi ’bezasi aku ambo ambo, mudri, engazu ori’ba suruni ma eselia, suru ma egalepi ma eselia, adani Manaseni ma egalepi’i." 
1Chronicles6:62 Yi fe Gerisoni anzipi dri ori’ba yini vusi, aku ambo ambo mudri drini na suru Isakari pini ma eselia Aseri pie, Nafutali pie, Manase ovupi Basaniari pie dria." 
1Chronicles6:63 Merari anzipi dri yi fe odrisi ’bezasi ori’ba yini vusi, aku ambo ambo mudri drini iri, engazu suru Rubeni pini ma eselia, Gadi pie, Zebuluni pie." 
1Chronicles6:64 Anzi Israelini ’divi fe ’ba Levini dri aku ambo ambo’ angu ageiniari beni," 
1Chronicles6:65 Yi fe odrisi ’bezasi suru Yuda anzipi pini ma eselia, Simeoni anzipi pie, Benyamini anzipi pie­dria, aku ambo ambo e’dale rusi ’diyi." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ori’ba anzi Kohatini ma azi ’diyi ovu aku ambo ambo ovupi yi ma angua engazu suru Efiraimuni ma eselia ’diyi be. 
1Chronicles6:67 Yi fe yi dri laku amboru ’bani apazu alenia ’diyi: Sekemu angu oniru Efiraimuniri pi angu ageiniari be, Gezeri pi angu ageiniari be indi," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokirneamu pi angu ageiniari be, Beti-horoni pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aiyaloni pi angu ageiniari be, Gatirimoni pi angu ageiniari be dria;" 
1Chronicles6:70 te suru ali Manaseni ma eselia: Aneri pi angu ageiniari be, Bileamu pi angu lageiniari be, ori’ba anzi Kohatini acepi ’diyi ma joloko dri." 
1Chronicles6:71 Fe anzi Gerisonini dri engazu ori’ba suru ali Manaseni ma eselia: Golani Basaniari pi angu ageiniari be, Asitaroti pi angu ageiniari be;" 
1Chronicles6:72 te engazu suru Isakarini ma eselia fe Kedesi pi angu ageiniari be, Daberati pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramoti pi angu ageiniari be, Anemu pi angu ageiniari be;" 
1Chronicles6:74 te engazu suru Aserini ma eselia fe Masali pi angu ageiniari be, Abidoni pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki pi angu ageiniari be, Rehobu pi angu ageiniari be;" 
1Chronicles6:76 te suru Nafutalini ma eselia: Kedesi Galiliari pi angu agemiani be, Hamoni pi angu ageiniari be, Kiriataimu pi angu ageiniari be." 
1Chronicles6:77 Fe ’ba Levini acepi jolokoru anzi Merarini ’diyi dri engazu suru Zebulunini ma eselia: Rimono pi angu ageiniari be, Tabori pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:78 azini Yoridania ’aa’dasi Yerikoa, Yoridani ma kala etuni efurialeruria, engazu suru Rubenini ma eselia, fe yi dri Bezeri angu roko driari pi angu ageiniari be, Yaza pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemoti pi angu ageiniari be, Mefaati pi angu ageiniari be;" 
1Chronicles6:80 te engazu suru Gadini ma eselia fe Ramoti Gileadiari pi angu agei­nari be, Mahanaimu pi angu ageiniari be," 
1Chronicles6:81 Hesiboni pi angu ageiniari be, Yazeri pi angu ageiniari pie dria." 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakari anzipi: Tola pi,pua pi,Yasubu pi,Simironi pie,yi su." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola anzipi:Uzi pi, Yamai pi,Ibisamu pi,Samueli pie,yi ’ba ’wara ori’ba yi atapini ma dri cepi ’diyi,yi Tola vile ’diyi, yi’ba ombaru a’bianzi yini ma eselia ’diyi; kalafe yini ewe Daudi ngareri alifu kali iri drini iri drini turu azia." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi anzipi: Izirahia piyi. Izirahia anzipi: Mikaeli pi, Obadia pi, Yoeli pi, Isihia pie, yi towi; yi dria ’ba ’ba dri cepi ’diyi;" 
1Chronicles7:4 ’ba ’diyi be tualu a’bianzi yini vusi, azini yi atapi ma ori’ba vusi, ’ba ongulumuro ombani ’diyi indi, alifu kali na drini azia, yini ovule oku pie anzi be kakaurisi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Adripi yini ori’ba Isakarini dria ma eselia, ’ba ombaru ovupi lazaru a’bianzi yini vusi ’diyi, yi alifu kali aro drini aziri." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benyamini anzipi: Bela pi, Bekeri pi, Yediaeli pie, yi na." 
1Chronicles7:7 Be­la anzipi: Eziboni pi, Uzi pi, Uzieli pi, Yerimoti pi, Iri pie, yi towi; ’ba ori’ba yi atapini ma dri cepi ’diyi, ’ba ombaru ’diyi, la yi a’bianzi yini vusi alifu kali iri drini iri, drini kali na drini su." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekeri anzipi: Zemira pi, Yoasi pi, Eliezeri pi, Elioenai pi, Omiri pi, Yeremoti pi, Abiya pi, Anatoti pi, Alemeti pie. ’Diyi dria Bekeri ma anzi." 
1Chronicles7:9 La yi a’bi olaza vusi, a’bianzi yini vusi, yi ’ba yi atapi ma ori’ba ma dri cepi ’diyi, ’ba ombaru alifu kali iri, drini turu iri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Yediaeli anzipi: Bilani piyi. Bilani anzipi: Yeusi pi, Benyamini pi, Ehudi pi, Kenaana pi, Zetani pi, Tarisisi pi, Ahisahari pie." 
1Chronicles7:11 ’Diyi dria Yediaeli ma anzi, la yi ’ba yi atapi ma ori’ba dri cepi ’diyi vusi, ’ba ombaru ’diyi alifu mudri drini aziri drini turu iri, ndra ecopi mupi ’ba ongulumuru ma eselia ombaa ra ’diyi." 
1Chronicles7:12 Supimu pi Hupimu be yi anzi Irini, Husimu piyi yi anzi Aherini." 
1Chronicles7:13 Nafutali anzipi: Yazieli pi, Guni pi, Yezeri pi, Salumu pie, yi anzi Bilani." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manase anzipi: Asirieli pi, oku eri vilerini tileri’i, te oku erini ati’boru Arami ziruri ti Makiri Gileadi ma atini." 
1Chronicles7:15 Te Makiri je oku Hupimu piri Supimu be. Amvi ma ru Maaka’i. Mva iriri ma ru Zelofehadi’i; te Zelofehadi ti ini ezoanzini. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka Makiri vile oku nderi ti mva agupia, ’da runi Peresi’i; adri ma ru Seresi’i; anzi erini Ulamu pi Rakemu be oku nderi ti mva agupia, ’da runi Peresi’i; adri ma ru Seresi’i; anzi erini Ulamu pi Rakemu be." 
1Chronicles7:17 Anzi Ulamuni: Bedani piyi. ’Diyi Gileadi, Manase mvi Makiri ma mvi ma anzi." 
1Chronicles7:18 Amvi Hamoleketi ti Isihodi pi, Abiezeri pie, Mala pie." 
1Chronicles7:19 Te Semida anzipi yi Ahiani pi, Sekemu pi, Liki pi, Aniamu pie." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efiraimu anzipi: Sutela pi, mvi Beredi pi, mvi Tahati pi," 
1Chronicles7:21 mvi Zabadi pi, mvi Sutela pie, azini Ezeri pi Eleadi be, ’ba Gatua otile angu ndea ’diyini ofule ’diyi, a’disiku yini esile anyapa yini acelerisi." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efiraimu yi ma ati wu imvosi o’du kakau, adripi erini yi emu asini omizuni." 
1Chronicles7:23 Eri fi oku erini vu, oku nde isu mva ra, osi agupia; ’da runi Beria’i, a’disiku e’yo onzini i ’yele eri vile joarisi." 
1Chronicles7:24 Zini Seera, Beti-horoni valeruri pi sipi uruleruri pie, Uzeni-seera pieri’i." 
1Chronicles7:25 Mvini Refa’i, azini Resefu’i indi, mvini Tela’i, mvini Tahani’i," 
1Chronicles7:26 mvini Ladani’i, mvini Amihudi’i, mvini Elisama’i," 
1Chronicles7:27 mvini Nuni’i, mvini Yosua’i." 
1Chronicles7:28 Angu yini, pari yini ovuzu ’diyi be yi Beteli pi aku erini d iyi be, angu etuni efurialeru Naarani pie, etuni ’derialeru Gezeri pie aku erini ’diyi be, Sekemu pie indi aku erini ’diyi be, kpere Aza aku erini ’diyi be;" 
1Chronicles7:29 kala Manase anzipi vuleruria, yi Beti-seani pi aku erini ’diyi be, Taanaki pi aku erini ’diyi be, Megido pi aku erini ’diyi be, Dori pi aku erini ’diyi pie. Anzi Yusufu Israeli mvini ovu angu nde ’diyi ma alia." 
1Chronicles7:30 Aseri anzipi: Imina pi, Isiva pi, Isivi pi, Beria pie, yi amvini Sera’i." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beria anzipi: Heberi pi, Malikieli be, eri Birizaiti ma ati’i." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi ti Yafileti pi, Someri pi, Hotamu pie, yi amvini Sua’i." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yafileti anzipi: Pasaki pi, Bimali pi, Asivati pie. ’Diyi anzi Yafiletini." 
1Chronicles7:34 Semeri anzipi: Ahi pi, Roga pi, Yehuba pi, Aramu pie." 
1Chronicles7:35 Eri ma adri Helemu ma anzipi: Zofa pi, Imina pi, Selesi pi, Amali pie." 
1Chronicles7:36 Zofa anzipi: Sua pi, Harineferi pi, Suali pi, Beri pi, Imira pie," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri pi, Hodi pi, Sama pi, Silisa pi, Itirani pi, Beera pie." 
1Chronicles7:38 Yeteri anzipi: Yefune pi, Pisipa pi, Ara pie." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ula anzipi: Ara pi, Hanieli pi, Rizia pie." 
1Chronicles7:40 Diyi dria Aseri anzipi, ’ba ori’ba yi ma atapini ma dri cepi ’diyi, ’ba endreza, ’ba ombaru asi teza be, ’ba ’wara opianzi ma eselia ’diyi. La yi a’bianzi vusi a’di ’dizu, alifu kali iri drini azia." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamini ti mva okori Bela’i, iriri Asibeli’i, nari Ahara’i," 
1Chronicles8:2 suri Noha’i, towiri Rafa’i." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela i ma anzipi yi ndra Adari pi, Gera pi, Abihudi pi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisua pi, Naamani pi, Ahoa pi," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera pi, Sefufani pi, Huramu pie." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ehudi anzipi (yi ’ba ’wara yi atapi ma ori’ba dri cepi ’ba ovupi Gebaa ’diyi ma eselia, ’ba jile ati’baru Manahatia ’diyi)" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani pi, Ahiya pi, Gera pie, eri ji yi ati’baru; ti vini Usa pi Ahihudi be." 
1Chronicles8:8 Saharaimu oti anzi angu Moabunia, erini oku ini Husi­mu pi odroria Baara be ’boria." 
1Chronicles8:9 Eri oti anzi oku erini Hodesi dri: Yobabu pi, Zibia, pi, Mesa pi, Malikamu pie," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yeuzi pi, Sakia pi, Mirima pie. ’Diyi dria anzi erini, yi atapi ma ori’ba dri cepi ’diyi." 
1Chronicles8:11 Te Husimu dri eri ti Abitubu pi Elipaali be. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elipaali anzipi: Eberi pi, Misamu pi, Semedi pie, ’ba Ono pi sipi Lodi be aku yini ’diyi pieri," 
1Chronicles8:13 azini Beria pi Sema be (’ba yi atapi ma ori’ba Aiyalonia ’diyi dri cepi, fepi ’ba Gatua ’diyini apazu ’diyi);" 
1Chronicles8:14 azini Ahio pi, Sasaki pi, Yeremoti pie." 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadia pi,Aradi pi, Ederi pi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaeli pi, Isipa pi, Yoha pie, anzi Beriani." 
1Chronicles8:17 Ze­badia pi, Mesulamu pi, Hiziki pi, Heberi pi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Isimerai pi, Izilia pi, Yobabupie,anzi Elipaalini." 
1Chronicles8:19 Ya­kimu pi, Zikiri pi, Zabidi pi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai pi, Ziletai pi, Elieli pi," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya pi, Beraya pi, Simirati pie, anzi Simeini." 
1Chronicles8:22 Isipani pi, Eberi pi, Elieli pi," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abidoni pi, Zikiri pi, Hanani pi," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania pi, Elamu pi, Anitotiya pi," 
1Chronicles8:25 lfideya pi, Penueli pie, anzi Sasakini." 
1Chronicles8:26 Samiserai pi, Seharia pi, Atalia pi," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaaresia pi, Eliya pi, Zikiri pie, anzi Yerohamuni." 
1Chronicles8:28 ’Ba’diyi ’ba ’wara yi atapi ma ori’ba dri cepi a’bianzi yini ma eselia ’eliyi; ’ba ’eliyi adri ovu Yerusalemua. 
1Chronicles8:29 Gibeoni ma ati ovu Gibeonia, runi Yeyeli’i, okuni ma ru Maaka’i." 
1Chronicles8:30 Mva erini okori Abidoni’i, Zuri pi, Kisi pi, Baali pi, Nadabu pi," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori pi, Ahio pi, Zekeri pi," 
1Chronicles8:32 Mikiloti pie (eri ti Simeani). Yi adri ndra adripi yini pie Yerusale­mua, kala adripi yini ma drilialere." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri ti Kisini, Kisi ti Sauloni, Saulo ti Yonatani pi, Malikisua pi, Abinadabu pi, Esibaali pie;" 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonatani mvini Meribi-baali’i; Meribi-baali ti Mikani. 
1Chronicles8:35 Mika anzipi: Pitoni pi, Meleki pi, Tarea pi, Ahazi pie." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi ti Yehoa­dani; Yehoada ti Alemeti pi, Azi­maveti pi, Zimiri pie; Zimiri ti Mozani." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza ti Bineani; mvi­ni Rafa’i, mvini Eleasa’i, mvini Azeli’i." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeli ovu agianzi be azia, yi ru ’dini: Azirikamu pi, Bokeru pi, Isimaeli pi, Searia pi, Obadia pi, Hanani pie. Anzi ’eliyi dria Azelini." 
1Chronicles8:39 Eri ma adri Eseki ma anzi yi ’eli mva okori Ulamu’i, iriri Yeusi’i, nari Elifeleti’i." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulamu anzipi yi dria ’ba ombaru asi teza be, ’ba osu gbipi ’diyi, yi ovu anzi be kakau, anzi yini ma anzipi be, yi turu alu drini kali towi. ’Diyi dria Benyamini anzi­yini." 
1Chronicles9:1 ’Dinile la di anzi Israelini dria a’bi yini vusi; mi ne, yi ovu sizaru buku opi Israelini ’diyini ma alia. Te ji Yudani ovuzu ati’boru Babulonia azi onzi yinisi." 
1Chronicles9:2 Te ’ba oko ovupi ndra aku yini ma alia yi vile angua ’diyi yi Israeli pi, atalau edeta edepi ’diyi pie, ’ba Levini ’diyi pie, ’ba Netini pie." 
1Chronicles9:3 ’Ba ovu­pi Yerusalemua ’diyi yi ’di, anzi Yu­dani ’diyi ma azi, anzi Benyaminini ’diyi ma azi, anzi Efiraimu pini Manase be ’diyi ma azi be:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Ami­hudi mvi Utai, Omiri mvi, Imiri mvi, Bani mvi, engapi Yuda mvi Perezi ma anzipi ma eseliari." 
1Chronicles9:5 Azini ’ba Silonini ma eselia: Asaya mva okori pi, anzi erini be." 
1Chronicles9:6 Zera anzipi ma eselia: Yeueli piyi adripi pie turu azia drini kali oromi. 
1Chronicles9:7 Benyamini anzipi ma eselia: Salu Mesulamu mvi, Hodavia mvi, Hasenua pi," 
1Chronicles9:8 bineya Yerohamu mvi pi, Ela Mikiri mvi Uzi ma mva pi, Mesula­mu Sefatia mvi, Rueli mvi, Ibiniya mvi pie;" 
1Chronicles9:9 adripi yini be a’bianzi yini vusi, kalafe yini turu oromi kali towi drini azia. ’Ba ’diyi dria ’ba yi atapi ma ori’ba dri cepi atapi yini ma, ori’ba vusi ’diyi." 
1Chronicles9:10 Atalau edeta edepi ’diyi ma eselia Yedaya pi, Yehoyaribu pi, Yakini pie," 
1Chronicles9:11 Azaria Hilikia mvi, Mesulamu mvi, Zadoki mvi, Merayo­ti mvi, Ahitubu mvi pi, eri ’ba ’ba drilia jo Munguniari;" 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaya Yerohamu mvi, Pasihuri mvi, Mali­kiya mvi pi, Maasai Adieli mvi, Yazera mvi, Mesulamu mvi, Mesile­miti mvi, Imeri mvi pie;" 
1Chronicles9:13 adripi yini ’ba yi atapi ma ori’ba dri cepi ’diyi pie dria, alifu alu turu aziri drini kali azia, yi ’ba dri fupi tu jo Mungu­ni ma azisi ra ’diyi." 
1Chronicles9:14 ’Ba Levini ma eselia Semaya Hasubu mvi, Azirikamu mvi, Hasa­bia mvi pi, anzi Merarini ma eselia;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakibakari pi, Heresi pi, Galali pi, Matania Mika mvi, Zikiri mvi, Asafu mvi pie;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadia Semaya mvi, Galali mvi, Yedutuni mvi pi Asa Elikana mvi ma mvi Berekia ovupi aku ’ba Netofatini ma aliari" 
1Chronicles9:17 ’Ba jotile agei tepi ’diyi: Salumu pi, Akubu pi, Talimoni pi, Ahimani pie, yi adripi be (yi ma drilia amboru Salumu’i);" 
1Chronicles9:18 yi ’ba ndra kali opini ma agei tepi kala etuni efurialeru ’diyi. Yi ovu ndra ’ba pari Levi anzipini hema asozuri ma kalitile ma agei tepi ’diyi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Te Salumu Kore mvi, Ebiasafu mvi, Kora mvi pi, adripi i atapi ma ori’baru ’diyi be, yi ’ba Korani ’diyi, ovu azi inzitaniri ma drilia, bere ma kalitile agei tezu; te yi atapi ovu ndra pari Yehova ma hema asozuri ma drilia, kalitileni ma agei tezu." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehasi Eleazari mvi ovu ndra yi ma drilia okorisini; te Yehova ovu ndra eri be. 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakaria Meselemia mvini de ini, ’ba hema ti ecizani ma tile age tepiriru," 
1Chronicles9:22 ’Ba ndra yini opele kalitile agei tepiriru kalitilia ’diyi dria ndra turu iri drini mudri drini iri. La yi a’bi yini vusi aku yini ma alia, Daudi pini o’bale Samueli ’ba e’yo ndreza ndrepiri be azi pele yi driri ma alia ’diyi." 
1Chronicles9:23 ’Dini azi ’ba ’diyini anzi yini be, ovu jo Yehovani ma kalitile ma agei tezu, adaru yi te bere ma tile ma agei amutisi amutisi." 
1Chronicles9:24 Kala su ’diyi vusi ’ba jotile agei tepi ’diyi indi, etuni efurialeru, etuni ’derialeru, andraleru, azini uruleru dria;" 
1Chronicles9:25 te adripi yini aku yini ma alia ’diyi ma emu yi vu o’du aziri vusi o’du aziri vusi, ovuzu yi be;" 
1Chronicles9:26 a’disiku ’ba amboru yi drilia su, jotile agei tepi ’ba Levini ’diyi, ovu azi ’bani awale yi driri ma alia ’dani, yi ovu jo aliza ndu ndu ma agei tezo, azini pari lonyi ma ta mbazu jo Munguni ma alia ’diyi ma agei tezu indi." 
1Chronicles9:27 Yi la jo Munguni ma ageia ogogo, a’disiku fe azi ’dari yi ma dria, azini jotile ozizu o’biti vusi o’biti vusi ovu azi yini." 
1Chronicles9:28 ’Ba azini yi ma eselia, azi yini afazu inzitani ma agei tezu, a’disiku yini yi ofiria joa, yi afazu nde la la, azini yini yi of uri a amve, yi la la indi." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ope yi ma azi afa joa ’diyi ma agei tezu, afa dria pari alatararuria ’diyi be, anyafura inikiniri pie, patiefi ma su pie, odu pie, obiese pie, afa aji arikariru beri pie dria." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ata­lau edeta edepi ’diyi ma anzi ma azi yi adri odu aji be arikariruri ede. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitia, eri ’ba Levini alu, Salumu ’ba Korani ma mva okori, azi erini afa osile ajikosi ’diyi ma dria." 
1Chronicles9:32 Adripi yini azini, anzi ’ba Koha­tinini ’diyi, ovu azi mikate ecetarurini ma dria, eri edezu sabato vusi sabato vusi." 
1Chronicles9:33 Te ’ba ’diyi ovu ’ba ongo ngopi, ori’ba yi atapini ma dri cepi ’ba Levini ’diyi, yi la jo aliza ma alia azi azini ’yekokoru, yini azi yini ngale etu be ini be indirisi." 
1Chronicles9:34 ’Ba ’diyi ovu ’ba ori’ba yi a’bipini ma dri cepi suru Levini ma alia ’diyi, yi ’ba ’wara a’bianzi yini vusi dria, yi adri ovu Yerusalemua." 
1Chronicles9:35 Te Gibeoni ma ati Yeyeli ovu Gibeonia, okuni ma ru Maaka’i," 
1Chronicles9:36 azini mva erini okori Abidoni’i, Zuri pi, Kisi pi, Baali pi, Neri pi, Nadabu pi," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori pi, Ahio pi, Zekaria pi, Mikiloti pie;" 
1Chronicles9:38 Miki­loti ti Simeamuni. ’Ba ’diyi adri ovu Yerusalemua adripi yini be tualu indi, adripi yini ma drilialeru." 
1Chronicles9:39 Te Neri ti Kisini, Kisi ti Sauloni, Saulo ti Yonatani pi, Malikisua pi, Abinadabu pi, Esibaali pie;" 
1Chronicles9:40 Yo­natani ma mvini Meribi-baali’i, Meribi-baali ti Mikani." 
1Chronicles9:41 Mika anzipi Pitoni pi, Meleki pi, Tarea pi, Ahazi pie;" 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi ti Yarani, Yam ti Alemeti pi, Azimaveti pi, Zimiri pie; Zimiri ti Mozani." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza ti Bineani; eri ma mvini Refaya’i, eri ma mvini Eleasa’i, eri ma mvini Azeli’i." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli ovu anzi be azia, yi ma ru yi ’di: Azirikamu pi, Bokeru pi, Isimaeli pi, Searia pi, Obadia pi, Hanani pie; ’ba ’diyi ovu anzi Azelini." 
1Chronicles10:1 Te ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyi ’di a’di ’ba Israelini be; ’ba Israelini apa ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyi dri ra, o’de odra oni Giliboaa ra." 
1Chronicles10:2 ’Ba Filisi­tiaa ’diyi dro Saulo pi ma vuti anzipi be okposi; ’ba Filisitia ’diyi ofu Yonatani pi, Abinadabu pie, Maliki­sua pie, anzi Saulo vile ’diyi." 
1Chronicles10:3 Omba nderi eca Saulo ma ruaa onzikanyaru tu, ’ba osu gbipi ’diyi isu eri ra; eri ma asi oti ’ba osu gbipi ’diyi ma e’yosi tu." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saulo nga di ’yo ’ba gombere ombani eriniri ’dupiri ma tia kini, Mi enze sei mini, mi ma so ma ani, ’ba agele liza kokoru ’diyi kazu emuzu ma inzazu ku. Te ’ba gombere ombani erini ’dupiri leni ku, erini ovule uri be turisi. Ka’dini Saulo nze di i ma sei ra, ’be sinia." 
1Chronicles10:5 ’Ba gombere ombani Saulo vileri ’dupiri ka ndre Saulo dra ’bo, nze vini sei i vileri ’dinile, ’be i sinia, dra ra." 
1Chronicles10:6 ’Dini Saulo pi odra, anzi be na tro; ’ba eri vile joa ’diyi odra dria eri be tualu." 
1Chronicles10:7 ’Ba Israelini dria ovupi e’bu alia ’diyi ka ndre yi apa ra ’dini, azini Saulo pi anzi erini be odra ’bo, yi ku aku amboru yiniri ra, apa ra; ’ba Filisi­tiaa ’diyi emu di adri ’ba nde ’diyi ma pariani." 
1Chronicles10:8 Dru ’dini, ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyiru emuria ’ba yini ofule ’diyi ma bongo otruria, yi isu Saulo pi ma avu o’de anzipi be oni Giliboa ma dria." 
1Chronicles10:9 Yi otru afa suza erini, yi ’du eri ma dri, afa ombani erini be, yi pe ’ba ma ti angu Filisitiaria kala vusi dria, e’yoni ojizu wura inzile inzi yini edele ’diyi vu, azini ’ba ’dale ’diyi vu, le’yoni ekuzu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Yi nga di afa eri vile ombani ’diyi o’ba adrou yini ’diyi ma joa, epa eri ma dri Dagoni vile joa." 
1Chronicles10:11 Te ’ba dria Yabesi-gileadia diyi ka e’yo dria ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyini ’yele Saulo ma ruaa ’diyi ma e’yo eri ’bo," 
1Chronicles10:12 ’ba asi teza be ’diyi enga dria ra, yi o’du Saulo pi ma avu anzipi be, cii yi Yabesia, sa fala yini kumara pati Yabesiari ma etia, nyani nyaka o’du aziri ku." 
1Chronicles10:13 ’Dini Saulo dra azi onzi erini ’yele Yehova vurisi, a’disiku erini e’yo Yehovani ma ta mbale kurisi, azini vini erini e’yo amaza ndale ’ba orindi onzi beri ma tia e’yo zizu tiniarisi indi," 
1Chronicles10:14 azini erini Yeho­vani zile’i kurisi; eri fu eri ani, oja suru fezu Daudi Yese mvi dri." 
1Chronicles11:1 Etu ’dasi ’ba Israelini oku yi dria Daudi vu Hebironia, kini, Mi ne, ama fala mini za mi ruaari be indi." 
1Chronicles11:2 Andra Sauloni ovuzu opi­rurisi, eri ndra bani mi’i ’ba Israelini ofupi azini yi ofipiri; Yehova Mungu miniri ’yo ndra mi tia kini, Mi nga nyaka fe ’ba mani Israelini ’diyi dri, mi nga adri ’ba mani Israelini ma drilia opiru mi’i." 
1Chronicles11:3 ’Dini ’ba ’wara Israelini yi emu dria opi vu Hebironia; Daudi nga aziza azi yi be Hebironia Yehova ma milia ani, yi osu odu Daudi ma dria ovuzu opiru ’ba Israelini ma drilia, ekile e’yo Yehovani ’yole Samueli ma tisirile." 
1Chronicles11:4 Te Daudi pi Israeli be dria nga mu Yerusalemua (di Yebusi’i), ’ba Yebusini, angu nde e’ipiru ’diyi de ’dale indi." 
1Chronicles11:5 ’Ba angu e’ipiru Yebusia ’diyi ’yo Daudi ma ria, Mi ngani fi ’dia ku. Te ti, Daudi pa angu okporu Zioniniri ra, eri aku amboru Daudiniri’i." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daudi nga di ’yo, ’ba ngapi ’ba Yebusini ofupi okori nga adri opiru ’ba dri cezuni. Yoabu Zeruya mvi tu oko, ’ba di eri opiru ani." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi ri angu okporu ndea; omve di eri aku amboru Daudiniri ani. 
1Chronicles11:8 Si vini aku kalania dria, engazu Miloa, si ageiniasi kuru kuru; te Yoabu nga di aku nde ma azi acepi ’diyi edeni," 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi fu amboru drile drile, Yehova asikari ongulumurunirini ovule eri berisi." 
1Chronicles11:10 ’Ba ’diyi ’ba ’wara ’ba okporu Daudini ovuzu yi be ’diyi ma drilia, yi e’da yi okporu eri be opi nyaza erini ma alia eri ’bazu opiru, yi’i ’ba Israelini be dria, e’yo Yehovani ’yole Israeli ma e’yosirile." 
1Chronicles11:11 ’Ba okporu Daudini ovuzu yi be ’diyi ma kalafe ’di: Yasobeamu ’ba Hakimonini ma mvi, opi ’ba kali na ’diyini; eri enga ndra aju ini a’di ’dizu ’ba turu na ’diyi be, ofu yi dria etu alu." 
1Chronicles11:12 Vutinia Eleazari Dodo mvi ’ba Ahohini, eri ’ba alu ’ba okporu na ’diyi ma eseliari." 
1Chronicles11:13 Eri ovu ndra Daudi be Pasi-damimua ra, ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyini yi okuria a’di ’diria ’dale. Isu de amvu indi ’daa anyani kazu alenia turi; ’ba nde yi apa ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyi dri apa apa." 
1Chronicles11:14 Te yi oso pa amvu nde ’diri ma alia agadua eri arizu, yi ofu ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyi ra, te Yehova opa yi pata amborusi." 
1Chronicles11:15 ’Ba na ’ba kali na amboru ’diyi ma eselia si Daudi vu kata etia, oni oji Adulamuaria; isu de ’ba Filisitiaa ongulumuru ’diyi aso hema yini e’bu Refaimuaria." 
1Chronicles11:16 Daudi ovu yi be pari okporu ma alia nga ’dani, azini asikari ’ba Filisitiaa angu tepi ’diyi de Betelehemua." 
1Chronicles11:17 Yi avijo fu Daudini ra, kini, ’Ba ’diyi la! a’di ka mani yi a’di kalitile Betelehemuari ebe fe mani mvuni ya!" 
1Chronicles11:18 ’Ba na ’diyi efu asikari ongulumuru ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyini ma eseliasi, mu yi a’di kalitile Betelehemuari ebe, eji Daudi dri. Te Daudi leni eri mvu ku; osu eri va Yehovani," 
1Chronicles11:19 ’yo ra kini, Mungu mani ma oga mani e’yo ’diri ’yeko ’dini si. Ma nga ’ba idri yini adipi dra dri ’diyi ma ari mvu ra ya? A’disiku yini idri yini adile dra dri eri ejizurisi. E’yo ’disi leni ndra ani yi nde mvuzu ku. E’yo ’diyi ’ba okporu na ’diyi ’yeni." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisai Yoabu adrini ndra ambo ’ba na ’diyi ma driliani. Eri enga aju ini a’di ’dizu ’ba turu na be yi ofuzu, ru erini e’da ’ba na ’diyini ma eselia ani." 
1Chronicles11:21 ’Ba na nde ’diyi ma eselia inzi eri aga ’ba iri ’diyi ra, ’ba eri yi ma drilia yi ma dri cezu ani; te eri cani ’ba na oko ’diyi ma paria ku." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya Yehoyada ’ba asi teza be Kabizeelia ’yeta okporu ’yepiri ma mvi, ofu Arieli Moabuari ma anzi iri ’diyi ra; eri si va indi fu kami alu ’bile ma alia o’du ozooni ’dizu si berisi." 
1Chronicles11:23 Fu vini ’ba Misirini alu, ’ba nde ’ba izuni, zozani wuale towi. ’Ba nde Misiria ’di ma dria isu de aju indi ekile bau afa ’bani bongo cazu­rinirile; te Benaya si vunia kali be, pa aju nde Misiriou ma driarisi ra, so eri ani aju nde eri vileri ma vusi." 
1Chronicles11:24 E’yo ’diyi Benaya Yehoyada mvi ’ye yini, runi ku ’ba na okporu nde ’diyi ma eselia ani." 
1Chronicles11:25 Mi ne, inzi eri aga ’ba kali na ’diyi ra, te eri cani ’ba na oko ’diyi ma paria ku. Daudi nga eri ’ba asikari i ma ngulupi ma agei tepi ’diyi ma drili" 
1Chronicles11:26 ’Ba okporu asikari ongulumuru ’diyi ma eselia ’diyi yi ’di: Asaheli Yoabu adri pi, Elihanani Dodo Bete­thlehemuari ma mvi pi," 
1Chronicles11:27 Samoti ’ba Harorini pi, Helezi ’ba Pelonini pi," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira Ikesi ’ba Tekoni ma mvi pi, Abiezeri ’ba Anatotini pi," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai ’ba Husatini pi, ai ’ba Ahohini pi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai ’ba Neto­fatini pi, Heledi Baana ’ba Netofatini mvi pi," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai Ribai Gibea Benya­mini anziyiari mvi pi, Benaya ’ba Piratoni pi," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai yi nyiri Gaasi ma tiari pi, Abieli ’ba Aribatini pi," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimaveti ’ba Baharumuni pi, Eliaba ’ba Saalibonini pi," 
1Chronicles11:34 Hasemuni ’ba Gizonini ma anzipi pi, Yonatani Sage ’ba Hararini mvi pi," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu Sakari ’ba Hararini mvi pi, Elifali Uri mvi pi," 
1Chronicles11:36 He­feri ’ba Mekeratini pi, Ahiya ’ba Pelonini pi," 
1Chronicles11:37 Heziro ’ba Karime­lini pi, Naarai Ezibai mvi pi," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoeli Natani adri pi, Mibihari Hagiri mvi pi," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki ’ba Amo­nini pi, Naharai ’ba Berotini, gombere ombani Yoabu Zeruya mviniri ’dupiri pi," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira ’ba Itirini pi, Garebu ’ba Itirini pi," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria ’ba Hitini pi, Zabadi Alai mvi pie," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina Siza ’ba Rubenini ma mvi, opiru ’ba Rubenini ma eseliari pi, azini ’ba kali na yi eri be," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hana­ni Maaka mvi pi, Yosafati ’ba Miti­nini pi," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uzia ’ba Asiteratini pi, Sama pi Yeyeli be, yi Hotamu ’ba Aroerini ma anzi," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediaeli Si­miri mvi pi, adri Yoha ’ba Tizini pi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli ’ba Mahavini pi, Yeribai pi, Yosavia be, yi Elinaamu ma anzi, Itima ’ba Moabuni pi," 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli pi, Obedi pi, Yaasieli ’ba Mezobani pie dria." 
1Chronicles12:1 ’Ba ’diyi’i yi ’ba emupi Daudi vu Zikilagia, erini nga i ziria Saulo Kisi mvi ma e’yosi ’diyi; yi ovu ’ba okporu eri ma aza kopi ombaa ’diyi ma eselia." 
1Chronicles12:2 Yi ’ba osu be ’diyi, azini yi eco yi ma dri ayuzaru irile irile, dri ndi dri eji be, oni ’bani ’bele bakasiri yazu, ’ye gbizu osusi indi; yi ’ba Saulo ma adripiru, suru Benyaminini." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ambo yini dri1eri Ahiezeri’i, vutinia Yoasi’i, yi anzi Semaa ’ba Gibeatinini; Yezieli pi, Peleti be, yi anzi Azimavetini; Beraka pi, Yehu ’ba Anatotiari be," 
1Chronicles12:4 Isimaya ’ba Gibeonini, eri ’ba okporu alu ’ba kali na ma eseliari, eri ’ba kali na nde ’diyi ma driliari’i; Yeremia pi, Yahazieli pi, Yohanani pi, Yozabadi ’ba Gederatini pi," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai pi, Yerimoti pi, Bealia pi, Semaria pi, Sefatia ’ba Harufini pi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elikana pi, Isia pi, Azareli pi, Yoezeri pi, Yasobeamu pi, yi ’ba Koranini;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Yoela pi, Zebadia be, yi anzi Yerohamu ’ba Gedoriarini." 
1Chronicles12:8 Azini ’ba Gadini ’diyi ma eselia ’ba azini co yi ma esele muzu Daudi vu pari okporu roko driaria, ’ba okporu asi teza be, ’bani imbale a’di ’diza ma e’yosi ’bo ’diyi, ’ba ecopi gombere ombani ayupi aju be ra, yi ma andretini ovuzu ekile kami ma andretile ’diyi, yi ovu ongu be ekile oborojo oni dria ’diyi1e." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezeri ’ba amboru yi driliari, ’ba iriri Obadia, nari Eliabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 suri Misimana, towiri Yeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 aziari Atai, azi­riri Elieli," 
1Chronicles12:12 arori Yohanani, oro­miri Elizabadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 mudriri Yere­mia, mudri drini aluri Makibanai’i." 
1Chronicles12:14 ’Ba ’diyi anzi Gadini ma eselia yi asikari ongulumuru ma dri cepi ’diyiru, ’ba werearu si ’ba turule, ’ba amboru turi si ’ba alifu alule." 
1Chronicles12:15 ’Ba ’diyi ’ba zopi mba okorisi Yoridania ’aa’dasi ’diyi, o’du yi ndeni tizu cirisi, yi fe ’ba ovupi e’bu alia ’diyini apazu dria ra, kala etuni efurialeruri pia etuni ’derialeruri be iri tro." 
1Chronicles12:16 Te anzi Benyaminini pi ma eselia Yudani be, ’ba azini emu pari okporua Daudi vu indi." 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi mu dri fuzu yi be amve, omvi e’yo yi tia kini, Emi ka emu asi anzurusi ma vu ma aza kozu, ma asini nga i ekpa eminiri be; te emi ka emu ma o’di nyazu ari’ba mani dri, isu de e’yo inzoruni ma dria yo, Mungu ama a’bipini ma ndre e’yo ’dirini, ma ega e’yo nde ma dria." 
1Chronicles12:18 Orindi nga di esi Amasai ma dria ani, eri’i ’ba amboru ’ba kali na ma eseliari, eri ’yo ra kini, Ama mini, Daudi; ama kala miniria, mi Yese mvi’i! Asi anzuru, e, asi anzuru ma ovu mi vu, asi anzuru ma ovu ’ba mi aza kopi ’diyi vu indi! Mungu minirini mi aza kolerisi. Daudi nga di yi a’i ani ra, eri ’ba yi ’ba asikari ongulumuru ma dri cepi ’diyiru." 
1Chronicles12:19 ’Ba Manaseni azini nga yi onze fizu Daudi vu, erini muria ’ba Filisitini be a’di ’dizu Saulo be; te yi koni yi ma aza ku, a’disiku opi ’ba Filisitiaa ’diyini ama e’yo, dro eri ani ra, kini, Eri nga i oja vile ambo ini Saulo vu, dra ejizu ama dria." 
1Chronicles12:20 Eri­ni muria Zikilagia, ’ba Manaseni ’diyi onze yi fizu eri vu: Adina pi, Yozabadi pi, Yediaeli pi, Mikaeli pi, Yozabadi pi, Elihu pi, Ziletai pi, yi ’ba asikari Manaseni alifu alu ma dri cepi ’diyi." 
1Chronicles12:21 Yi ko Daudi ma aza asikari acipi afa opapi saaru ’diyi ma e’yosi; yini ovule dria ’ba okporu asi teza benirisi, yini ovule ’ba asikari ongulumuru ma dri cepirirurisi indi." 
1Chronicles12:22 O’du vusi o’du vusi ’ba yi emu Daudi vu eri ma aza kozu, kpere yini ecaria asikari ongulumuru, ekile asikari ongulumuru Mungunile." 
1Chronicles12:23 ’Ba ’ba afa ombani supi ’diyi ma dri cepi omba alia, emupi Daudi vu Hebironia suru Sauloniri ojazu Daudiniru, ekile e’yo Yehovani ’yo1erile ’diyi ma kalafeni ’di." 
1Chronicles12:24 Anzi Yudani gombere ombani ’dupi aju be ’diyi alifu azia drini turu aro, yi ’ba yi edepi ombasi ’diyi." 
1Chronicles12:25 Anzi Simeonini ma eselia, ’ba okporu asi teza be omba ma e’yosi ’diyi alifu aziri drini turu alu;" 
1Chronicles12:26 Anzi Levini ma eselia alifu su drini turu azia. 
1Chronicles12:27 Yehoyada ovu ’ba ori’ba Aronini ’diyi ma dri cepiri, ’ba eri be alifu na drini turu aziri." 
1Chronicles12:28 Zadoki karilau okporu asi teza beri pi ’ba asikari dri cepi ombaa ovupi eri ati ma ori’ba ma eselia ’diyi be kali In drini iri. 
1Chronicles12:29 Anzi Benyaminini ma eselia, Saulo ma adripiru ’diyi alifu na; a’disiku ecazu etu ’ disi esele amboru yini turi bi ori’ba Sauloni ma vuti." 
1Chronicles12:30 Anzi Efiraimuni ma eselia alifu kali iri drini turu aro, ’ba okporu ’ba asi teza be, ’ba endrezaru ori’ba yi ma atapini ma eselia ’diyi." 
1Chronicles12:31 Te suru ali Manaseni ma eselia alifu mudri drini aro, ’bani ecele rusi rusi emuzu Daudini ’bazu opiru ’diyi." 
1Chronicles12:32 Anzi Isakarini ma eselia, ’ba o’du onyiru ma e’yo vapi Israeli ma ’ye ngoni yari nipi ra ’diyi, ’ba yi ma dri cepi ’diyi turu iri; azini adripi yini dria eri azita yini." 
1Chronicles12:33 ’Ba Zebulu­nini ma eselia, ’ba ecopi mupi asikari ongulumuru ma eselia ombaa ’diyi, omba nde ’bapi azita vusi, ovupi afa ombani ndu ndu be dria ’diyi, alifu kali towi: te yi ’ba ecopi omba ’bapi azita vusi ovupi asi iri be ku diyi." 
1Chronicles12:34 ’Ba Nafutalini ma eselia ’ba asikari dri cepi ’diyi alifu alu, azini yi be ’ba gombere pi ’dupi aju be ’diyi alifu kali na drini aziri." 
1Chronicles12:35 ’Ba Danini ma eselia ’ba omba ’bapi azita vusi ’diyi alifu kali iri drini aro drini turu azia. 
1Chronicles12:36 ’Ba Aserini ecopi mupi asikari ongulu­muru ombani ma eselia ra omba ’bapi azita vusi ’diyi alifu kali su. 
1Chronicles12:37 Azi­ni kala Yoridanini ’aa’dasiria, ’ba Rubenini piyi ma eselia ’ba Gadini pie, suru ali Manaseni be, ’ba engapi alenia ovupi afa ombani ndu ndu ’bani muzu ombaa ’diyi be ’diyi dria alifu turu alu kali iri." 
1Chronicles12:38 ’Ba ’diyi dria yi ’ba ombani, ecopi omba ’bapi azita vusi ’diyi, emu asi adarusi Hebironia Daudini ’bazu opiru Israeli dria ma drilia; ’ba Israelini acepi ’diyi dria ovu asi alusi Daudini ’bazu opiru indi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Yi ovu ’dale Daudi be o’du na afa nyaza nyaria azini mvuza mvuria, yi ma adripini afa edele yi dri ngonde ’borisi." 
1Chronicles12:40 Drinisi ’ba ovupi yi be ogogo cazu kpere Isakari pia, Zebu­luni pie, Nafutali pie, eji enya akanya gaaru piyi ma dria, ngamia pie, aka­nya farasiru ’diyi pie, ranya pie, adani eji anyafura pi, elio efi ombale ngulu ngulu ’diyi pie, zabibu ’wiza pie, patiefi su pie, odu pie, ranya pie, kabilo be karakarau; ayikoni ovule Israeli ma aliarisi." 
1Chronicles13:1 Daudi pi eci ti ’ba asikari alifu alu azini ’ba turu alu dri cepi ’diyi be, adani ’ba dria ’ba dri cepiru ’diyi be." 
1Chronicles13:2 Daudi ’yo ’ba Israelini yi okupi ’diyi ma tia dria kini, Eri ka ovu emi milia ba, azini e’yoni ka enga Yehova Mungu amani vu, ama pe di e’yoni ma ti pari dria adripi amani kule angu Israelini dria ma alia ’diyi vu, yi’i ovupi atalau edeta edepi ’ba Leviniru ’diyi be, aku ambo ambo aku nyiri nyirini ovuzu yi ma ageia ’diyi ma alia ’diyi, ’dini yi ma oku yi ama vu ani." 
1Chronicles13:3 Te ama ma mu sanduku Mungu amanirini omvizu ama vu dika ani; amani ndra mule vunia e’yoni zizu ewu Saulo ngare kurisi. 
1Chronicles13:4 ’Ba dria ndra yi okupi ’diyi a’i kini yi nga ’ye ’dinile ra, e’yo ndeni ovule kililiru ’ba dria ma miliarisi." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ka’dini Daudi oku ’ba Israelini dria tualu engazu Sihori yi raza Misiriaria kpere pari ’bani fizu Hamatiniria dria, muzu sanduku Munguni omvizu engazu Kiriatiyearimua." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daudi tu di ani ’ba Israelini be dria uru Baala vu, angu nde Kiriati-yearimu ovupi Yudani­ri’i, muzu sanduku Munguni ejizu engazu ’dale, eri Yehova ripi kerubi ma dria uru, yini omvele Ru ndesiri’i."
